    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        // 创建配置对象\r\n        com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig alipayConfig = new com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置网关地址和应用参数\r\n        alipayConfig.setServerUrl(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAppId(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId());\r\n        alipayConfig.setPrivateKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setFormat(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat());\r\n        alipayConfig.setCharset(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAlipayPublicKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setSignType(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType());\r\n        \r\n        // 设置超时时间 - 使用配置的值\r\n        alipayConfig.setConnectTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout());\r\n        alipayConfig.setReadTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝客户端，连接超时: {}ms, 读取超时: {}ms\", \r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        // 创建配置对象\r\n        com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig alipayConfig = new com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置网关地址和应用参数\r\n        alipayConfig.setServerUrl(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAppId(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId());\r\n        alipayConfig.setPrivateKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setFormat(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat());\r\n        alipayConfig.setCharset(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAlipayPublicKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setSignType(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType());\r\n        \r\n        // 设置超时时间 - 使用配置的值\r\n        alipayConfig.setConnectTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout());\r\n        alipayConfig.setReadTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝客户端，连接超时: {}ms, 读取超时: {}ms\", \r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());",
        "range": {

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            return new DefaultAlipayClient(alipayConfig);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝客户端失败\", e);\r\n            // 如果创建失败，使用老方式创建\r\n            return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            return new DefaultAlipayClient(alipayConfig);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝客户端失败\", e);\r\n            // 如果创建失败，使用老方式创建\r\n            return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                    paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "payment:\n  # 回调域名配置，用于支付回调\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\n  \n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\n  wechat:\n    app-id: wx123456789abcdef\n    mch-id: 1230000109\n    key: abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\n    \n  # 支付宝配置（沙箱环境配置）\n  alipay:\n    app-id: 2021000148670346  # 请替换为您的沙箱应用ID\n    private-key: \n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "payment:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  # 回调域名配置，用于支付回调"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  callback-host: http://localhost:8090"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  wechat:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    app-id: wx123456789abcdef"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    mch-id: 1230000109"
          },

            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    key: abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456"
          },

            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify"
          },

            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "  # 支付宝配置（沙箱环境配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  alipay:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,

          },

            "lineNumber": 78,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "payment:\n  # 回调域名配置，用于支付回调\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\n  \n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\n  wechat:\n    app-id: wx123456789abcdef\n    mch-id: 1230000109\n    key: abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\n    \n  # 支付宝配置（沙箱环境配置）\n  alipay:\n    app-id: 2021000148670346  # 请替换为您的沙箱应用ID\n    private-key: \n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,

          "startPosition": {

            "line": 64

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    public PaymentController(PaymentService paymentService, @Qualifier(\"customObjectMapper\") ObjectMapper objectMapper) {\r\n        this.paymentService = paymentService;\r\n        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    public PaymentController(PaymentService paymentService, @Qualifier(\"customObjectMapper\") ObjectMapper objectMapper) {\r\n        this.paymentService = paymentService;\r\n        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 43,
            "line": 44
          },

            "column": 32,
            "line": 22
          }

      "score": 0.4775390625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e testAlipayPayment(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap) {\r\n        log.info(\"测试支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n        \r\n        // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n        PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置金额\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n            Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n            if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n            } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认测试金额\r\n            request.setAmount(new BigDecimal(\"0.01\"));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置会员类型\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n            request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认会员类型\r\n            request.setMembershipType(\"MONTHLY\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置描述\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n            request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认描述\r\n            request.setDescription(\"测试支付 - 医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置用户ID",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e testAlipayPayment(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap) {\r\n        log.info(\"测试支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n        \r\n        // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n        PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置金额\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n            Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n            if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n            } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认测试金额\r\n            request.setAmount(new BigDecimal(\"0.01\"));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置会员类型\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n            request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认会员类型\r\n            request.setMembershipType(\"MONTHLY\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置描述\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n            request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认描述\r\n            request.setDescription(\"测试支付 - 医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置用户ID",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.alipay.sdk\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ealipay-sdk-java\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.github.wxpay\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ewxpay-sdk\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e0.0.3\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- 二维码生成工具 --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.google.zxing\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ecore\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e3.5.1\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.google.zxing\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ejavase\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e3.5.1\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- Spring Data JPA --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.boot\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003espring-boot-starter-data-jpa\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- Fastjson --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.alibaba\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003efastjson\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e1.2.83\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n    \u003c/dependencies\u003e\n    \u003cdependencyManagement\u003e\n        \u003cdependencies\u003e\n            \u003cdependency\u003e\n                \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.boot\u003c/groupId\u003e\n                \u003cartifactId\u003espring-boot-dependencies\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n                \u003cversion\u003e${spring-boot.version}\u003c/version\u003e\n                \u003ctype\u003epom\u003c/type\u003e\n                \u003cscope\u003eimport\u003c/scope\u003e\n            \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003c/dependencies\u003e\n    \u003c/dependencyManagement\u003e\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n            Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n            if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                request.setUserId(((Number) userIdObj).longValue());\r\n            } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    request.setUserId(Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj));\r\n                } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认用户ID (系统管理员)\r\n            request.setUserId(1L);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"测试支付参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 直接调用支付服务，绕过控制器\r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n            return ApiResponse.success(response);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"测试支付宝支付失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"测试支付宝支付失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n            Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n            if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                request.setUserId(((Number) userIdObj).longValue());\r\n            } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    request.setUserId(Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj));\r\n                } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 默认用户ID (系统管理员)\r\n            request.setUserId(1L);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"测试支付参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 直接调用支付服务，绕过控制器\r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n            return ApiResponse.success(response);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"测试支付宝支付失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"测试支付宝支付失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n            \r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            Long userId = null;\r\n            // 首先从请求参数中获取userId\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    userId = ((Number) userIdObj).longValue();\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj);\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果请求参数中没有userId，尝试从认证信息获取",

        "originalContents": " {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n            \r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            Long userId = null;\r\n            // 首先从请求参数中获取userId\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    userId = ((Number) userIdObj).longValue();\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj);\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果请求参数中没有userId，尝试从认证信息获取",

(\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cimg \n                      src={qrCodeUrl} \n                      alt=\"支付二维码\" \n                      className=\"w-64 h-64 border rounded-lg p-2\"\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e请扫码支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-4\"\u003e\n                    {paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"请使用微信扫一扫\" : \"请使用支付宝扫一扫\"}\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm text-center mb-6 max-w-md\"\u003e\n                    \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-1\"\u003e\n                      金额: \u003cspan className=\"font-medium\"\u003e¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-3\"\u003e\n                      会员类型: \u003cspan className=\"font-medium\"\u003e{membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"bg-amber-50 p-3 rounded-md text-amber-800 mb-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm\"\u003e\n                        二维码有效期为30分钟，请尽快完成支付。支付成功后页面将自动更新，请勿关闭此页面。\n                      \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \n                    {/* 开发环境中模拟支付成功按钮 */}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n...\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n...\n() =\u003e {\n  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    // 处理支付接口返回结果\n    if (response \u0026\u0026 response.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 response.data) {\n      const responseData = response.data;\n      setPaymentId(responseData.paymentId);    // 保存支付ID用于后续查询\n      setQrCodeUrl(responseData.qrCodeUrl);    // 设置二维码图片URL\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");          // 更新状态为处理中\n      \n      // 显示提示信息\n      toast({\n        title: \"支付二维码已生成\",\n        description: &#96;请使用${paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"微信\" : \"支付宝\"}扫描二维码完成支付&#96;,\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 处理错误情况\n      throw new Error(response?.message || \"创建支付订单失败\");\n    }\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    // 错误处理\n    console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n    toast({\n      title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n      description: error.message || error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);  // 重置加载状态\n  }\n};\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n    \n    // 处理支付接口返回结果\n    if (response \u0026\u0026 response.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 response.data) {\n      const responseData = response.data;\n      setPaymentId(responseData.paymentId);    // 保存支付ID用于后续查询\n      setQrCodeUrl(responseData.qrCodeUrl);    // 设置二维码图片URL\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");          // 更新状态为处理中\n      \n      // 显示提示信息\n      toast({\n        title: \"支付二维码已生成\",\n        description: &#96;请使用${paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"微信\" : \"支付宝\"}扫描二维码完成支付&#96;,\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 处理错误情况\n      throw new Error(response?.message || \"创建支付订单失败\");\n    }\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    // 错误处理\n    console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n    toast({\n      title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n      description: error.message || error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);  // 重置加载状态\n  }\n};\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 181

          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const paymentApi = {\n...\nconst paymentApi = {\n...\npaymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\n\r\n  \r\n  ...\n\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 78.5,
            "text": "..."
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 78.5,
            "text": "..."
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "export const paymentApi = {"
          },

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "const paymentApi = {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "paymentApi = {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 161,

            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r"

          {

            "lineNumber": 164,

        "originalContents": "\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

com.google.zxing.WriterException;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.client.j2se.MatrixToImageWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\nimport java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;\r\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\r\nimport java.util.Base64;\r\nimport java.util.Collections;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n                com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePrecreateResponse response = executeWithRetry(() -\u003e {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);\r\n                    } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，准备重试: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                        throw e;\r\n                    }\r\n                }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒\r\n                \r\n                // 检查响应是否成功\r\n                if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败：{}\", response.getMsg());\r\n                    // 失败后使用降级方案\r\n                    throw new Exception(\"支付宝返回失败: \" + response.getMsg());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 获取支付宝返回的二维码内容\r\n                qrCodeContent = response.getQrCode();\r\n                log.info(\"支付宝返回的二维码内容：{}\", qrCodeContent);\r\n            } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                // 使用降级方案 - 创建模拟的二维码内容\r\n                log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，使用本地模拟二维码: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                \r\n                // 创建模拟的支付宝支付链接 (仅用于开发测试)\r\n                qrCodeContent = \"https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=\" + outTradeNo \r\n                    + \"\u0026total_amount=\" + request.getAmount().toString() \r\n                    + \"\u0026subject=医护培训平台会员订阅\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码图片并转为Base64格式\r\n            qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(qrCodeContent);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);            // 保存二维码URL\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING); // 更新状态为处理中\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);",

          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "            // 更新支付记录\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);            // 保存二维码URL\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING); // 更新状态为处理中\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "            paymentRepository.save(payment);"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n                com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePrecreateResponse response = executeWithRetry(() -\u003e {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);\r\n                    } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，准备重试: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                        throw e;\r\n                    }\r\n                }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒\r\n                \r\n                // 检查响应是否成功\r\n                if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败：{}\", response.getMsg());\r\n                    // 失败后使用降级方案\r\n                    throw new Exception(\"支付宝返回失败: \" + response.getMsg());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 获取支付宝返回的二维码内容\r\n                qrCodeContent = response.getQrCode();\r\n                log.info(\"支付宝返回的二维码内容：{}\", qrCodeContent);\r\n            } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                // 使用降级方案 - 创建模拟的二维码内容\r\n                log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，使用本地模拟二维码: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                \r\n                // 创建模拟的支付宝支付链接 (仅用于开发测试)\r\n                qrCodeContent = \"https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=\" + outTradeNo \r\n                    + \"\u0026total_amount=\" + request.getAmount().toString() \r\n                    + \"\u0026subject=医护培训平台会员订阅\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码图片并转为Base64格式\r\n            qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(qrCodeContent);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);            // 保存二维码URL\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING); // 更新状态为处理中\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 45,
            "line": 219
          },

            "column": 57,

          }

      },

        "originalContents": "\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"alipay\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择支付宝后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成支付宝付款码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"wechat\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择微信支付后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成微信支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Tabs\u003e\n              \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n              \u003cCardFooter\u003e\n                \u003cButton \n                  className=\"w-full\" \n                  onClick={handlePayment}\n                  disabled={loading}\n                \u003e\n                  {loading ?       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            try {\r\n                // 构建支付宝请求参数 - 使用当面付接口\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();  // 获取支付宝客户端\r\n                \r\n                // 创建当面付请求对象\r\n                com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest alipayRequest = new com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest();\r\n                // 设置异步通知地址 - 支付成功后支付宝会通知这个地址\r\n                alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n                \r\n                // 构建业务参数\r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);                    // 商户订单号\r\n                bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());// 订单总金额\r\n                bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");              // 订单标题\r\n                bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());              // 订单描述\r\n                bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\");                      // 订单超时时间\r\n                \r\n                // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n                alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                \r\n                // 调用支付宝当面付API（带重试机制）\r\n                log.info(\"调用支付宝当面付API生成二维码，参数：{}\", alipayRequest.getBizContent());\r\n                // 执行API调用并支持失败重试",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            try {\r\n                // 构建支付宝请求参数 - 使用当面付接口\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();  // 获取支付宝客户端\r\n                \r\n                // 创建当面付请求对象\r\n                com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest alipayRequest = new com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest();\r\n                // 设置异步通知地址 - 支付成功后支付宝会通知这个地址\r\n                alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n                \r\n                // 构建业务参数\r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);                    // 商户订单号\r\n                bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());// 订单总金额\r\n                bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");              // 订单标题\r\n                bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());              // 订单描述\r\n                bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\");                      // 订单超时时间\r\n                \r\n                // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n                alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                \r\n                // 调用支付宝当面付API（带重试机制）\r\n                log.info(\"调用支付宝当面付API生成二维码，参数：{}\", alipayRequest.getBizContent());\r\n                // 执行API调用并支持失败重试",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 是否成功\r\n     */\r\n    boolean mockPaymentSuccess(Long paymentId);\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.service;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 是否成功\r\n     */\r\n    boolean mockPaymentSuccess(Long paymentId);\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 73
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional  // 事务管理，确保数据一致性\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        // 生成外部订单号\r\n        String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存到数据库\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());              // 设置用户ID\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());              // 设置支付金额\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);          // 设置支付类型为支付宝\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum()); // 设置会员类型\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());     // 设置描述\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);                   // 设置外部订单号\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);            // 设置状态为待支付\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录到数据库\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付宝二维码内容\r\n            String qrCodeContent;\r\n            String qrCodeUrl;",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional  // 事务管理，确保数据一致性\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        // 生成外部订单号\r\n        String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存到数据库\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());              // 设置用户ID\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());              // 设置支付金额\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);          // 设置支付类型为支付宝\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum()); // 设置会员类型\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());     // 设置描述\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);                   // 设置外部订单号\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);            // 设置状态为待支付\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录到数据库\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付宝二维码内容\r\n            String qrCodeContent;\r\n            String qrCodeUrl;",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n...\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n...\n() =\u003e {\n  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n...\nsetInterval(async () =\u003e {\n...\nasync () =\u003e {\n      try {\n ...\n catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);\n      }\n    }, 2000); // 每2秒检查一次支付状态\n  }\n  \n  // 组件卸载或状态变化时清理定时器\n  return () =\u003e {\n    if (intervalId) {\n      clearInterval(intervalId);\n    }\n  };\n}, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan, toast]);\n\n// 处理支付按钮点击事件\nconst handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n  try {\n    setLoading(true);  // 设置加载状态\n    \n    // 准备支付数据：金额、会员类型和描述\n    const paymentData = {\n      amount: String(membershipPrices[membershipPlan]), // 确保金额是字符串格式\n      membershipType: membershipPlan.toUpperCase(),     // 转为大写以匹配后端枚举\n      description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n    };\n    \n    let response;\n    \n    // 根据选择的支付方式调用对应的支付API\n    if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n      // 调用微信支付接口\n      response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n    } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n      // 调用支付宝支付接口\n      response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n    } else {\n      // 银行卡支付(简化处理，直接成功)\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n        setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n      }, 2000);\n      return;\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付类型\r\nexport enum PaymentType {\r\n  WECHAT = 'WECHAT',\r\n  ALIPAY = 'ALIPAY',\r\n  CARD = 'CARD'\r\n}",

            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "// 支付类型\r"

            "lineNumber": 46,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付类型\r\nexport enum PaymentType {\r\n  WECHAT = 'WECHAT',\r\n  ALIPAY = 'ALIPAY',\r\n  CARD = 'CARD'\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 50
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,

          }
        },

      },
      "score": 0.4580078125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/wechat', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('微信支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },",

            "lineNumber": 78,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/wechat', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('微信支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n        // 连接超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int connectTimeout = 60000;\r\n        // 读取超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int readTimeout = 60000;\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "text": "    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r"

            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    // 支付回调配置\r"

            "text": "    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r"

            "text": "        // 应用ID\r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n        // 连接超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int connectTimeout = 60000;\r\n        // 读取超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int readTimeout = 60000;\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格定义\nconst membershipPrices = {\n  yearly: 299,   // 年度会员价格：299元\n  quarterly: 99, // 季度会员价格：99元\n  monthly: 39    // 月度会员价格：39元\n}\n\n// 会员计划对应的描述\nconst membershipDescriptions = {\n  yearly: \"年度会员\",\n  quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n  monthly: \"月度会员\"\n}",

          },

            "lineNumber": 34,

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格定义\nconst membershipPrices = {\n  yearly: 299,   // 年度会员价格：299元\n  quarterly: 99, // 季度会员价格：99元\n  monthly: 39    // 月度会员价格：39元\n}\n\n// 会员计划对应的描述\nconst membershipDescriptions = {\n  yearly: \"年度会员\",\n  quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n  monthly: \"月度会员\"\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/app/payment/page.tsx"
      },
      "score": 0.4501953125

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "             // 保存更新\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())         // 支付记录ID\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)             // 外部订单号\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())        // 支付金额\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)   // 支付状态\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)               // 二维码URL\r\n                    .payUrl(qrCodeContent)              // 支付链接\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime()) // 创建时间\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())   // 过期时间\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 带重试机制的方法执行\r\n     * @param supplier 要执行的方法\r\n     * @param maxRetries 最大重试次数\r\n     * @param delayMillis 重试间隔（毫秒）\r\n     * @return 执行结果\r\n     * @throws Exception 执行过程中的异常\r\n     */",
        "detailedLines": [

        ],
        "originalContents": "             // 保存更新\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())         // 支付记录ID\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)             // 外部订单号\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())        // 支付金额\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)   // 支付状态\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)               // 二维码URL\r\n                    .payUrl(qrCodeContent)              // 支付链接\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime()) // 创建时间\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())   // 过期时间\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 带重试机制的方法执行\r\n     * @param supplier 要执行的方法\r\n     * @param maxRetries 最大重试次数\r\n     * @param delayMillis 重试间隔（毫秒）\r\n     * @return 执行结果\r\n     * @throws Exception 执行过程中的异常\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 获取二维码链接\r\n            String codeUrl = resp.get(\"code_url\");\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(codeUrl);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

            "text": "                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "                    .build();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        } catch (Exception e) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单异常\", e);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败\", e);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "    }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 获取二维码链接\r\n            String codeUrl = resp.get(\"code_url\");\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(codeUrl);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 355
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 327
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        // 创建配置对象\r\n        com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig alipayConfig = new com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置网关地址和应用参数\r\n        alipayConfig.setServerUrl(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAppId(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId());\r\n        alipayConfig.setPrivateKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setFormat(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat());\r\n        alipayConfig.setCharset(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAlipayPublicKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setSignType(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType());\r\n        \r\n        // 设置超时时间 - 使用配置的值\r\n        alipayConfig.setConnectTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout());\r\n        alipayConfig.setReadTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝客户端，连接超时: {}ms, 读取超时: {}ms\", \r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        // 创建配置对象\r\n        com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig alipayConfig = new com.alipay.api.AlipayConfig();\r\n        \r\n        // 设置网关地址和应用参数\r\n        alipayConfig.setServerUrl(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAppId(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId());\r\n        alipayConfig.setPrivateKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setFormat(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat());\r\n        alipayConfig.setCharset(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset());\r\n        alipayConfig.setAlipayPublicKey(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey());\r\n        alipayConfig.setSignType(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType());\r\n        \r\n        // 设置超时时间 - 使用配置的值\r\n        alipayConfig.setConnectTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout());\r\n        alipayConfig.setReadTimeout(paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());\r\n        \r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝客户端，连接超时: {}ms, 读取超时: {}ms\", \r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getConnectTimeout(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getReadTimeout());",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付请求\r\nexport interface PaymentRequest {\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  membershipType: string;\r\n  paymentType?: string;\r\n  description?: string;\r\n  userId?: number;\r\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n...\n\n\n// 轮询支付状态 - 每2秒检查一次订单状态\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n  \n  // 只在处理中状态且有支付ID时进行轮询\n  if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n    intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        // 调用后端API检查支付状态\n        const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n        \n        // 数据验证\n        if (!response || !response.data || !response.data.data) {\n          console.error(\"支付状态检查返回数据格式错误\", response);\n          return;\n        }\n        \n        const status = response.data.data.status;\n        \n        // 支付成功处理\n        if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");  // 更新支付状态为成功\n          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);  // 停止轮询\n          \n          // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n          const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n          if (userInfo) {\n            const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n            userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n            userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n            localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n          }\n          \n          // 显示支付成功提示\n          toast({\n            title: \"支付成功\",\n            description: \"您已成功开通会员服务\",\n            variant: \"default\",\n          });\n        } \n        // 支付失败或关闭处理\n        else if (status === \"FAILED\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"error\");  // 更新支付状态为错误\n          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);  // 停止轮询\n          toast({\n            title: \"支付失败\",\n            description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n            variant: \"destructive\",\n          });\n        }\n      }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n// 轮询支付状态 - 每2秒检查一次订单状态\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n  \n  // 只在处理中状态且有支付ID时进行轮询\n  if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n    intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        // 调用后端API检查支付状态\n        const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n        \n        // 数据验证\n        if (!response || !response.data || !response.data.data) {\n          console.error(\"支付状态检查返回数据格式错误\", response);\n          return;\n        }\n        \n        const status = response.data.data.status;\n        \n        // 支付成功处理\n        if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");  // 更新支付状态为成功\n          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);  // 停止轮询\n          \n          // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n          const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n          if (userInfo) {\n            const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n            userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n            userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n            localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n          }\n          \n          // 显示支付成功提示\n          toast({\n            title: \"支付成功\",\n            description: \"您已成功开通会员服务\",\n            variant: \"default\",\n          });\n        } \n        // 支付失败或关闭处理\n        else if (status === \"FAILED\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"error\");  // 更新支付状态为错误\n          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);  // 停止轮询\n          toast({\n            title: \"支付失败\",\n            description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n            variant: \"destructive\",\n          });\n        }\n      }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 90

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",
