            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "};"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 164
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 118
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    public PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId) {\r\n        // 查询支付订单\r\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)\r\n                .orElseThrow(() -\u003e new RuntimeException(\"支付订单不存在\"));\r\n        \r\n        // 如果支付订单已经完成，直接返回\r\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS || \r\n            payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED || \r\n            payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.CLOSED) {\r\n            return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 如果支付订单已经超时，更新状态\r\n        if (payment.getExpireTime().isBefore(LocalDateTime.now())) {\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 根据支付方式查询实际支付状态",

          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    public PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId) {\r\n        // 查询支付订单\r\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)\r\n                .orElseThrow(() -\u003e new RuntimeException(\"支付订单不存在\"));\r\n        \r\n        // 如果支付订单已经完成，直接返回\r\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS || \r\n            payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED || \r\n            payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.CLOSED) {\r\n            return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 如果支付订单已经超时，更新状态\r\n        if (payment.getExpireTime().isBefore(LocalDateTime.now())) {\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 根据支付方式查询实际支付状态",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/{paymentId}/status\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e queryPaymentStatus(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.queryPaymentStatus(paymentId);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/cancel\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e cancelPayment(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r\n        \r\n        boolean result = paymentService.cancelPayment(paymentId);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(result));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/mock-success\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e mockPaymentSuccess(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "     * 取消支付\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "     */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/cancel\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e cancelPayment(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "        boolean result = paymentService.cancelPayment(paymentId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(result));\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "     */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/mock-success\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e mockPaymentSuccess(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "            @PathVariable Long paymentId)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/{paymentId}/status\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e queryPaymentStatus(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.queryPaymentStatus(paymentId);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/cancel\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e cancelPayment(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r\n        \r\n        boolean result = paymentService.cancelPayment(paymentId);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(result));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/{paymentId}/mock-success\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e\u003e mockPaymentSuccess(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 42,
            "line": 299
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 274

      },
      "score": 0.453125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/wechat', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('微信支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/wechat', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('微信支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关类型\r\nexport interface Payment {\r\n  id: number;\r\n  userId: number;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  type: string;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  createdAt: string;\r\n  updatedAt: string;\r\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n...\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n...\n() =\u003e {\n  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    // 处理支付接口返回结果\n    if (response \u0026\u0026 response.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 response.data) {\n      const responseData = response.data;\n      setPaymentId(responseData.paymentId);    // 保存支付ID用于后续查询\n      setQrCodeUrl(responseData.qrCodeUrl);    // 设置二维码图片URL\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");          // 更新状态为处理中\n      \n      // 显示提示信息\n      toast({\n        title: \"支付二维码已生成\",\n        description: &#96;请使用${paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"微信\" : \"支付宝\"}扫描二维码完成支付&#96;,\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 处理错误情况\n      throw new Error(response?.message || \"创建支付订单失败\");\n    }\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    // 错误处理\n    console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n    toast({\n      title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n      description: error.message || error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);  // 重置加载状态\n  }\n};\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n    \n    // 处理支付接口返回结果\n    if (response \u0026\u0026 response.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 response.data) {\n      const responseData = response.data;\n      setPaymentId(responseData.paymentId);    // 保存支付ID用于后续查询\n      setQrCodeUrl(responseData.qrCodeUrl);    // 设置二维码图片URL\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");          // 更新状态为处理中\n      \n      // 显示提示信息\n      toast({\n        title: \"支付二维码已生成\",\n        description: &#96;请使用${paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"微信\" : \"支付宝\"}扫描二维码完成支付&#96;,\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 处理错误情况\n      throw new Error(response?.message || \"创建支付订单失败\");\n    }\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    // 错误处理\n    console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n    toast({\n      title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n      description: error.message || error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);  // 重置加载状态\n  }\n};\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.WECHAT) {\r\n                // 查询微信支付订单状态\r\n                WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl());\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                data.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.orderQuery(data);\r\n                \r\n                if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) \u0026\u0026 \"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                    String tradeState = resp.get(\"trade_state\");\r\n                    if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(tradeState)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"CLOSED\".equals(tradeState) || \"REVOKED\".equals(tradeState)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"查询支付状态异常\", e);\r\n            // 查询异常，不影响返回\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": " if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.WECHAT) {\r\n                // 查询微信支付订单状态\r\n                WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl());\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                data.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.orderQuery(data);\r\n                \r\n                if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) \u0026\u0026 \"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                    String tradeState = resp.get(\"trade_state\");\r\n                    if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(tradeState)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"CLOSED\".equals(tradeState) || \"REVOKED\".equals(tradeState)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"查询支付状态异常\", e);\r\n            // 查询异常，不影响返回\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return buildPaymentResponse(payment);\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 是否成功\r\n     */\r\n    boolean mockPaymentSuccess(Long paymentId);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 模拟支付成功（仅用于开发和测试环境）\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 是否成功\r\n     */\r\n    boolean mockPaymentSuccess(Long paymentId);\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n                    ...\n\n                    {process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' \u0026\u0026 paymentId \u0026\u0026 (\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"border-t pt-4 mt-4\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2\"\u003e开发环境模拟支付\u003c/p\u003e\n                        \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-2 justify-center\"\u003e\n                          \u003cButton\n                            variant=\"outline\"\n                            size=\"sm\"\n                            onClick={async () =\u003e {\n                              try {\n                                // 模拟支付成功\n                                const mockResponse = await fetch(&#96;http://localhost:8090/api/payments/${paymentId}/mock-success&#96;, {\n                                  method: 'POST',\n                                  headers: {\n                                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                                  }\n                                });\n                                \n                                if (mockResponse.ok) {\n                                  toast({\n                                    title: \"模拟支付成功\",\n                                    description: \"已模拟支付成功状态\",\n                                    variant: \"default\",\n                                  });\n                                }\n                              } catch (error) {\n                                console.error(\"模拟支付失败\", error);\n                              }\n                            }}\n                          \u003e\n                            模拟支付成功\n                          \u003c/Button\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    )}\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={handleCancelPayment}\u003e\n                    取消支付\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              ) :",

        "originalContents": "\n                    {process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' \u0026\u0026 paymentId \u0026\u0026 (\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"border-t pt-4 mt-4\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2\"\u003e开发环境模拟支付\u003c/p\u003e\n                        \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-2 justify-center\"\u003e\n                          \u003cButton\n                            variant=\"outline\"\n                            size=\"sm\"\n                            onClick={async () =\u003e {\n                              try {\n                                // 模拟支付成功\n                                const mockResponse = await fetch(&#96;http://localhost:8090/api/payments/${paymentId}/mock-success&#96;, {\n                                  method: 'POST',\n                                  headers: {\n                                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                                  }\n                                });\n                                \n                                if (mockResponse.ok) {\n                                  toast({\n                                    title: \"模拟支付成功\",\n                                    description: \"已模拟支付成功状态\",\n                                    variant: \"default\",\n                                  });\n                                }\n                              } catch (error) {\n                                console.error(\"模拟支付失败\", error);\n                              }\n                            }}\n                          \u003e\n                            模拟支付成功\n                          \u003c/Button\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    )}\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={handleCancelPayment}\u003e\n                    取消支付\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              ) :",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n        // 连接超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int connectTimeout = 60000;\r\n        // 读取超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int readTimeout = 60000;\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n        // 连接超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int connectTimeout = 60000;\r\n        // 读取超时时间，单位毫秒\r\n        private int readTimeout = 60000;\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "    public enum PaymentType {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    }\r"

            "lineNumber": 78,

          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    public enum PaymentStatus {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,

        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 81
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\");         "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n        ...\n\n\n        {paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cCard\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10\"\u003e\n              {qrCodeUrl ? (\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cimg \n                      src={qrCodeUrl} \n                      alt=\"支付二维码\" \n                      className=\"w-64 h-64 border rounded-lg p-2\"\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e请扫码支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-4\"\u003e\n                    {paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"请使用微信扫一扫\" : \"请使用支付宝扫一扫\"}\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm text-center mb-6 max-w-md\"\u003e\n                    \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-1\"\u003e\n                      金额: \u003cspan className=\"font-medium\"\u003e¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-3\"\u003e\n                      会员类型: \u003cspan className=\"font-medium\"\u003e{membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"bg-amber-50 p-3 rounded-md text-amber-800 mb-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm\"\u003e\n                        二维码有效期为30分钟，请尽快完成支付。支付成功后页面将自动更新，请勿关闭此页面。\n                      \u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \n                    {/* 开发环境中模拟支付成功按钮 */}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取请求体的原始内容\r\n     */\r\n    private String getRequestBody(HttpServletRequest request) throws IOException {\r\n        StringBuilder buffer = new StringBuilder();\r\n        BufferedReader reader = request.getReader();\r\n        String line;\r\n        while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {\r\n            buffer.append(line);\r\n        }\r\n        return buffer.toString();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付状态\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取请求体的原始内容\r\n     */\r\n    private String getRequestBody(HttpServletRequest request) throws IOException {\r\n        StringBuilder buffer = new StringBuilder();\r\n        BufferedReader reader = request.getReader();\r\n        String line;\r\n        while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {\r\n            buffer.append(line);\r\n        }\r\n        return buffer.toString();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付状态\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n                com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePrecreateResponse response = executeWithRetry(() -\u003e {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);\r\n                    } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，准备重试: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                        throw e;\r\n                    }\r\n                }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒\r\n                \r\n                // 检查响应是否成功\r\n                if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败：{}\", response.getMsg());\r\n                    // 失败后使用降级方案\r\n                    throw new Exception(\"支付宝返回失败: \" + response.getMsg());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 获取支付宝返回的二维码内容\r\n                qrCodeContent = response.getQrCode();\r\n                log.info(\"支付宝返回的二维码内容：{}\", qrCodeContent);\r\n            } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                // 使用降级方案 - 创建模拟的二维码内容\r\n                log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，使用本地模拟二维码: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                \r\n                // 创建模拟的支付宝支付链接 (仅用于开发测试)\r\n                qrCodeContent = \"https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=\" + outTradeNo \r\n                    + \"\u0026total_amount=\" + request.getAmount().toString() \r\n                    + \"\u0026subject=医护培训平台会员订阅\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码图片并转为Base64格式\r\n            qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(qrCodeContent);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);            // 保存二维码URL\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING); // 更新状态为处理中\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n                com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePrecreateResponse response = executeWithRetry(() -\u003e {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);\r\n                    } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，准备重试: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                        throw e;\r\n                    }\r\n                }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒\r\n                \r\n                // 检查响应是否成功\r\n                if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败：{}\", response.getMsg());\r\n                    // 失败后使用降级方案\r\n                    throw new Exception(\"支付宝返回失败: \" + response.getMsg());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 获取支付宝返回的二维码内容\r\n                qrCodeContent = response.getQrCode();\r\n                log.info(\"支付宝返回的二维码内容：{}\", qrCodeContent);\r\n            } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                // 使用降级方案 - 创建模拟的二维码内容\r\n                log.warn(\"支付宝API调用失败，使用本地模拟二维码: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                \r\n                // 创建模拟的支付宝支付链接 (仅用于开发测试)\r\n                qrCodeContent = \"https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=\" + outTradeNo \r\n                    + \"\u0026total_amount=\" + request.getAmount().toString() \r\n                    + \"\u0026subject=医护培训平台会员订阅\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码图片并转为Base64格式\r\n            qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(qrCodeContent);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);            // 保存二维码URL\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING); // 更新状态为处理中\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            try {\r\n                // 构建支付宝请求参数 - 使用当面付接口\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();  // 获取支付宝客户端\r\n                \r\n                // 创建当面付请求对象\r\n                com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest alipayRequest = new com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest();\r\n                // 设置异步通知地址 - 支付成功后支付宝会通知这个地址\r\n                alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n                \r\n                // 构建业务参数\r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);                    // 商户订单号\r\n                bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());// 订单总金额\r\n                bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");              // 订单标题\r\n                bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());              // 订单描述\r\n                bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\");                      // 订单超时时间\r\n                \r\n                // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n                alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                \r\n                // 调用支付宝当面付API（带重试机制）\r\n                log.info(\"调用支付宝当面付API生成二维码，参数：{}\", alipayRequest.getBizContent());\r\n                // 执行API调用并支持失败重试",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            try {\r\n                // 构建支付宝请求参数 - 使用当面付接口\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();  // 获取支付宝客户端\r\n                \r\n                // 创建当面付请求对象\r\n                com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest alipayRequest = new com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest();\r\n                // 设置异步通知地址 - 支付成功后支付宝会通知这个地址\r\n                alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n                \r\n                // 构建业务参数\r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);                    // 商户订单号\r\n                bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());// 订单总金额\r\n                bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");              // 订单标题\r\n                bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());              // 订单描述\r\n                bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\");                      // 订单超时时间\r\n                \r\n                // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n                alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                \r\n                // 调用支付宝当面付API（带重试机制）\r\n                log.info(\"调用支付宝当面付API生成二维码，参数：{}\", alipayRequest.getBizContent());\r\n                // 执行API调用并支持失败重试",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public boolean mockPaymentSuccess(Long paymentId) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 查询支付订单\r\n            Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)\r\n                    .orElseThrow(() -\u003e new RuntimeException(\"支付订单不存在\"));\r\n            \r\n            // 只有pending和processing状态的订单可以模拟支付成功\r\n            if (payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PENDING \u0026\u0026 payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PROCESSING) {\r\n                log.warn(\"订单状态不允许模拟支付成功，当前状态: {}\", payment.getStatus());\r\n                return false;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付状态为成功\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n            payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n            payment.setCallbackData(\"模拟支付成功\");\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新用户会员信息\r\n            updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n            \r\n            log.info(\"模拟支付成功，订单ID: {}, 交易号: {}\", payment.getId(), payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n            return true;\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"模拟支付成功失败\", e);\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}",

_**Agent**_

根据获取的信息，我将为您详细解释该项目的支付功能实现流程，特别是支付宝沙箱二维码支付部分。

# 项目支付功能实现流程

## 一、支付功能整体架构

该项目采用前后端分离架构，支付流程主要包括：
1. 前端选择支付方式和会员类型
2. 后端生成支付订单和二维码
3. 用户通过移动端扫码支付
4. 后端接收支付回调通知
5. 前端轮询支付状态
6. 支付成功后更新用户会员信息

## 二、支付宝沙箱二维码支付流程详解

### 1. 前端发起支付请求

用户在前端选择支付宝支付方式和会员类型后，前端通过调用`paymentApi.createAlipayPayment`方法向后端发送支付请求：

```typescript
// 支付宝支付请求发送
createAlipayPayment: (data: { 
  amount: string | number; 
  membershipType: string; 
  userId?: number;
  description?: string; 
}) => {
  // 确保数据格式正确
  const paymentData = {
    ...data,
    amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串
    membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串
  };
  
  // 直接使用fetch发送请求
  return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)
  }).then(response => {...});
}
```

### 2. 后端生成支付宝订单

后端接收到请求后，通过`PaymentController`处理请求，调用`PaymentService`的`createAlipayPayment`方法：

```java
@PostMapping("/alipay")
public ResponseEntity<ApiResponse<PaymentResponse>> createAlipayPayment(
        @RequestBody Map<String, Object> requestMap,
        HttpServletRequest httpRequest,
        Authentication authentication) {
    // 创建支付请求对象
    PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();
    // 设置支付参数...
    
    // 调用支付服务创建支付宝支付订单
    PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);
    return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));
}
```

### 3. 沙箱环境下生成支付宝二维码的核心流程

`PaymentServiceImpl`类中的`createAlipayPayment`方法是整个支付宝沙箱支付的核心实现：

```java
@Override
@Transactional
public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {
    // 生成外部订单号
    String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();
    
    try {
        // 1. 创建支付记录并保存到数据库
        Payment payment = new Payment();
        payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());
        payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());
        payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);
        payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());
        payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);
        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);
        payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期
        
        // 保存支付记录
        payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);
        
        // 2. 调用支付宝沙箱API生成支付二维码
        String qrCodeContent;
        String qrCodeUrl;
        
        try {
            // 创建支付宝客户端
            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();
            
            // 创建当面付请求对象
            com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest alipayRequest = new com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePrecreateRequest();
            // 设置异步通知地址
            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + "/api/payments/alipay/notify");
            
            // 构建业务参数
            Map<String, String> bizParams = new HashMap<>();
            bizParams.put("out_trade_no", outTradeNo);
            bizParams.put("total_amount", request.getAmount().toString());
            bizParams.put("subject", "医护培训平台会员订阅");
            bizParams.put("body", request.getDescription());
            bizParams.put("timeout_express", "30m");
            
            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));
            
            // 调用支付宝当面付API生成二维码
            com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePrecreateResponse response = executeWithRetry(() -> {
                return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);
            }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒
            
            // 检查响应是否成功
            if (!response.isSuccess()) {
                throw new Exception("支付宝返回失败: " + response.getMsg());
            }
            
            // 获取支付宝返回的二维码内容
            qrCodeContent = response.getQrCode();
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 支付宝API调用失败，使用降级方案
            qrCodeContent = "https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=" + outTradeNo 
                + "&total_amount=" + request.getAmount().toString() 
                + "&subject=医护培训平台会员订阅";
        }
        
        // 3. 生成二维码图片并转为Base64格式
        qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(qrCodeContent);
        
        // 4. 更新支付记录
        payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);
        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);
        paymentRepository.save(payment);
        
        // 5. 返回支付响应对象
        return PaymentResponse.builder()
                .paymentId(payment.getId())
                .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)
                .amount(request.getAmount())
                .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)
                .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)
                .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())
                .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())
                .build();
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        throw new RuntimeException("创建支付宝支付订单失败", e);
    }
}
```

#### 生成二维码的核心方法

```java
public String generateQrCode(String content) {
    try {
        // 定义二维码参数
        int width = 300;
        int height = 300;
        
        // 生成二维码矩阵
        BitMatrix bitMatrix = new MultiFormatWriter().encode(
                content, BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE, width, height);
        
        // 将二维码矩阵转为图片
        ByteArrayOutputStream outputStream = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        MatrixToImageWriter.writeToStream(bitMatrix, "PNG", outputStream);
        
        // 将图片转为Base64编码
        byte[] imageBytes = outputStream.toByteArray();
        String base64Image = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(imageBytes);
        
        return "data:image/png;base64," + base64Image;
    } catch (Exception e) {
        throw new RuntimeException("生成二维码失败", e);
    }
}
```

### 4. 前端展示二维码

前端收到支付响应后，展示二维码供用户扫描：

```tsx
{paymentStatus === "processing" && (
  <Card>
    <CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10">
      {qrCodeUrl ? (
        <>
          <div className="mb-4">
            <img 
              src={qrCodeUrl} 
              alt="支付二维码" 
              className="w-64 h-64 border rounded-lg p-2"
            />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">请扫码支付</h3>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground mb-4">
            {paymentMethod === "wechat" ? "请使用微信扫一扫" : "请使用支付宝扫一扫"}
          </p>
          <div className="text-sm text-center mb-6 max-w-md">
            <p className="text-muted-foreground mb-1">
              金额: <span className="font-medium">¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}</span>
            </p>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground mb-3">
              会员类型: <span className="font-medium">{membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}</span>
            </p>
            <div className="bg-amber-50 p-3 rounded-md text-amber-800 mb-4">
              <p className="text-sm">
                二维码有效期为30分钟，请尽快完成支付。支付成功后页面将自动更新，请勿关闭此页面。
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      ) : null}
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
)}
```

### 5. 前端轮询支付状态

前端展示二维码的同时，开始轮询查询支付状态：

```typescript
// 轮询支付状态 - 每2秒检查一次订单状态
useEffect(() => {
  let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
  
  // 只在处理中状态且有支付ID时进行轮询
  if (paymentStatus === "processing" && paymentId) {
    intervalId = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        // 调用后端API检查支付状态
        const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);
        
        const status = response.data.data.status;
        
        // 支付成功处理
        if (status === "SUCCESS") {
          setPaymentStatus("success");  // 更新支付状态为成功
          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);  // 停止轮询
          
          // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态
          // ...
          
          // 显示支付成功提示
          toast({
            title: "支付成功",
            description: "您已成功开通会员服务",
            variant: "default",
          });
        } 
        // 支付失败或关闭处理
        else if (status === "FAILED" || status === "CLOSED") {
          setPaymentStatus("error");
          clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);
          // ...
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("检查支付状态出错", error);
      }
    }, 2000); // 每2秒检查一次支付状态
  }
  
  // 组件卸载或状态变化时清理定时器
  return () => {
    if (intervalId) {
      clearInterval(intervalId);
    }
  };
}, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);
```

### 6. 后端处理支付宝回调通知

用户在手机上使用支付宝扫码支付完成后，支付宝服务器会向后端发送异步通知：

```java
@PostMapping("/alipay/notify")
public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map<String, String> params) {
    return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);
}
```

回调处理实现：

```java
@Override
@Transactional
public String handleAlipayCallback(Map<String, String> params) {
    try {
        // 验证签名
        boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);
        if (!signVerified) {
            return "failure";
        }
        
        // 获取支付订单号
        String outTradeNo = params.get("out_trade_no");
        
        // 查询订单
        Optional<Payment> paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);
        if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {
            return "failure";
        }
        
        Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();
        
        // 判断支付状态
        String tradeStatus = params.get("trade_status");
        
        if ("TRADE_SUCCESS".equals(tradeStatus) || "TRADE_FINISHED".equals(tradeStatus)) {
            // 支付成功
            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
            payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());
            paymentRepository.save(payment);
            
            // 更新用户会员信息
            updateUserMembership(payment);
            
            return "success";
        } else {
            // 其他状态
            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
            payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());
            paymentRepository.save(payment);
            
            return "failure";
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        return "failure";
    }
}
```

### 7. 后端查询支付状态实现

前端轮询时，后端会查询订单状态，甚至会主动向支付宝查询最新状态：

```java
@Override
public PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId) {
    // 查询支付订单
    Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("支付订单不存在"));
    
    // 如果支付订单已经完成，直接返回
    if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS || 
        payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED || 
        payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.CLOSED) {
        return buildPaymentResponse(payment);
    }
    
    // 如果支付订单已经超时，更新状态
    if (payment.getExpireTime().isBefore(LocalDateTime.now())) {
        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);
        paymentRepository.save(payment);
        return buildPaymentResponse(payment);
    }
    
    // 查询支付宝订单最新状态
    try {
        if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {
            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();
            AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();
            
            Map<String, String> bizParams = new HashMap<>();
            bizParams.put("out_trade_no", payment.getOutTradeNo());
            
            request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));
            AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);
            
            if (response.isSuccess()) {
                String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();
                if ("TRADE_SUCCESS".equals(tradeStatus) || "TRADE_FINISHED".equals(tradeStatus)) {
                    // 支付成功
                    payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
                    payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());
                    paymentRepository.save(payment);
                    
                    // 更新用户会员信息
                    updateUserMembership(payment);
                } else if ("TRADE_CLOSED".equals(tradeStatus)) {
                    // 支付关闭
                    payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);
                    paymentRepository.save(payment);
                }
            }
        }
        // ... 微信支付查询部分
    } catch (Exception e) {
        // 异常处理
    }
    
    return buildPaymentResponse(payment);
}
```

## 三、支付宝沙箱环境配置

项目使用支付宝沙箱环境进行开发和测试，相关配置在`application.yml`中：

```yaml
payment:
  # 回调域名配置
  callback-host: http://localhost:8090
  
  # 支付宝配置（沙箱环境）
  alipay:
    app-id: 2021000148670346  # 沙箱应用ID
    private-key: MIIEvgIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFA...  # 私钥
    # 其他配置...
    gatewayUrl: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do  # 沙箱网关地址
```

## 四、容错和降级处理

系统实现了完善的容错和降级机制：

1. 支付宝API调用失败时使用降级方案：
   ```java
   // 使用降级方案 - 创建模拟的二维码内容
   qrCodeContent = "https://sandbox.alipay.com/simulate-pay?out_trade_no=" + outTradeNo 
       + "&total_amount=" + request.getAmount().toString() 
       + "&subject=医护培训平台会员订阅";
   ```

2. 对支付宝API调用进行重试：
   ```java
   // 执行API调用并支持失败重试
   response = executeWithRetry(() -> {
       return alipayClient.execute(alipayRequest);
   }, 3, 2000); // 最多重试3次，每次间隔2秒
   ```

3. 支付订单自动超时处理：
   ```java
   if (payment.getExpireTime().isBefore(LocalDateTime.now())) {
       payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);
       paymentRepository.save(payment);
       return buildPaymentResponse(payment);
   }
   ```

## 总结

该项目的支付功能实现了完整的支付宝沙箱二维码支付流程：

1. 前端发起支付请求
2. 后端生成订单并调用支付宝沙箱API获取支付二维码
3. 将二维码返回给前端展示
4. 用户使用支付宝扫码支付
5. 支付宝服务器异步通知后端支付结果
6. 前端通过轮询获取支付状态
7. 支付成功后更新用户会员信息

整个流程设计合理，包含了完善的容错、重试和降级机制，确保支付流程的稳定性和用户体验。系统同时支持多种支付方式（支付宝和微信支付），满足不同用户的支付需求。

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/videos\")\r\npublic class VideosController {\r\n\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": " * \u003cp\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": " * 视频表 前端控制器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": " * \u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": " *\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": " * @author Zina\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": " * @since 2025-05-08\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": " */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "@RestController\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "@RequestMapping(\"/videos\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
