        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;video_tags&#96; VALUES (18, '康复指导', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for videos\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;videos&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;videos&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;title&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\r\n  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '视频描述',\r\n  &#96;category_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '分类ID',\r\n  &#96;instructor_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '讲师ID',\r\n  &#96;duration&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\r\n  &#96;video_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\r\n  &#96;thumbnail_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '缩略图URL',\r\n  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\r\n  &#96;views&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('draft','published','archived') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\r\n  &#96;upload_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_category_id&#96;(&#96;category_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  FULLTEXT INDEX &#96;ft_video_search&#96;(&#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;),\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;category_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;video_categories&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "INSERT INTO &#96;video_tags&#96; VALUES (18, '康复指导', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for videos\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;videos&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;videos&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;title&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\r\n  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '视频描述',\r\n  &#96;category_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '分类ID',\r\n  &#96;instructor_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '讲师ID',\r\n  &#96;duration&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\r\n  &#96;video_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\r\n  &#96;thumbnail_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '缩略图URL',\r\n  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\r\n  &#96;views&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('draft','published','archived') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\r\n  &#96;upload_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_category_id&#96;(&#96;category_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  FULLTEXT INDEX &#96;ft_video_search&#96;(&#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;),\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;category_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;video_categories&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 583
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 555
          }

        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.MaterialsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Materials\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"video_id\" property=\"videoId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"name\" property=\"name\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"description\" property=\"description\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"file_url\" property=\"fileUrl\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"file_type\" property=\"fileType\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"file_size\" property=\"fileSize\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"access_type\" property=\"accessType\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"download_count\" property=\"downloadCount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, video_id, name, description, file_url, file_type, file_size, access_type, download_count, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.VideosMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Videos\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"title\" property=\"title\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"description\" property=\"description\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"category_id\" property=\"categoryId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"instructor_id\" property=\"instructorId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"duration\" property=\"duration\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"video_url\" property=\"videoUrl\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"thumbnail_url\" property=\"thumbnailUrl\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"access_type\" property=\"accessType\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"views\" property=\"views\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"upload_date\" property=\"uploadDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, title, description, category_id, instructor_id, duration, video_url, thumbnail_url, access_type, views, status, upload_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE &#96;materials&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;video_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联的视频ID',\r\n  &#96;name&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',\r\n  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '资料描述',\r\n  &#96;file_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',\r\n  &#96;file_type&#96; varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件类型',\r\n  &#96;file_size&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',\r\n  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',\r\n  &#96;download_count&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_video_id&#96;(&#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;materials_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;video_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;videos&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r\n) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 14 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '学习资料表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Records of materials\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;materials&#96; VALUES (1, 1, '基础护理操作手册.pdf', '详细的基础护理操作步骤和注意事项', '/files/basic_nursing.pdf', 'pdf', 2048, 'external', 0, '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;materials&#96; VALUES (2, 2, '心肺复苏操作指南.pdf', '最新版心肺复苏操作指南和流程', '/files/cpr_guide.pdf', 'pdf', 3072, 'external', 0, '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE &#96;materials&#96;  (\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "  &#96;video_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联的视频ID',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "  &#96;name&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '资料描述',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "  &#96;file_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "  &#96;file_type&#96; varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件类型',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "  &#96;file_size&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  &#96;download_count&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_video_id&#96;(&#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "  CONSTRAINT &#96;materials_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;video_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;videos&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": ") ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 14 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '学习资料表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "-- ----------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "-- Records of materials\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "-- ----------------------------\r"

            "lineNumber": 148,

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频观看记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class WatchHistory implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer videoId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看进度(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer progress;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 是否完成观看\r\n     */\r\n    private Boolean completed;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 最后观看时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date lastWatched;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n    {\n      id: 7,\n      title: \"医疗团队协作\",\n      instructor: \"孙主任\",\n      duration: \"30分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-03-01\",\n      views: 432,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 8,\n      title: \"医疗记录规范\",\n      instructor: \"钱医生\",\n      duration: \"25分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-03-05\",\n      views: 321,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n  ]\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight\"\u003e视频管理\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e管理系统中的所有视频课程\u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cButton\u003e\n          \u003cPlusCircle className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n          上传新视频\n        \u003c/Button\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 处理视频加载元数据\n  const handleLoadedMetadata = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      setDuration(videoRef.current.duration)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 格式化时间显示\n  const formatTime = (time: number) =\u003e {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(time / 60)\n    const seconds = Math.floor(time % 60)\n    return &#96;${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}&#96;\n  }\n\n  // 处理进度条点击\n  const handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内  =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = Math.min(clickPosition * duration, timeLimit)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    } else {\n      // 会员可以自由跳转\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = clickPosition * duration\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 105,

          },

            "text": "      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth"

            "lineNumber": 108,

            "lineNumber": 109,

            "text": "        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime"
          },

            "lineNumber": 111,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,

          },

            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 处理视频加载元数据\n  const handleLoadedMetadata = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      setDuration(videoRef.current.duration)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 格式化时间显示\n  const formatTime = (time: number) =\u003e {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(time / 60)\n    const seconds = Math.floor(time % 60)\n    return &#96;${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}&#96;\n  }\n\n  // 处理进度条点击\n  const handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内  =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = Math.min(clickPosition * duration, timeLimit)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    } else {\n      // 会员可以自由跳转\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = clickPosition * duration\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 学习资料表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Materials implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的视频ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer videoId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 资料名称\r\n     */\r\n    private String name;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 资料描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 文件URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String fileUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 文件类型\r\n     */\r\n    private String fileType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 文件大小(KB)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer fileSize;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 下载次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer downloadCount;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.VideoTagRelations;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.IService;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频-标签关联表 服务类\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\npublic interface VideoTagRelationsService extends IService\u003cVideoTagRelations\u003e {\r\n\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 模拟视频数据，实际应从API获取\n  const videoData = {\n    id: params.id,\n    title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n    description: \"本课程详细讲解最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法，适合医护人员进阶学习。\",\n    instructor: \"李教授\",\n    date: \"2025-03-15\",\n    duration: \"60分钟\",\n    views: 1245,\n    type: \"external\", // 或 \"internal\"\n    videoUrl: \"/placeholder.mp4\", // 实际应为真实视频URL\n    materials: [\n      { id: 1, name: \"心肺复苏操作指南.pdf\", type: \"external\" },\n      { id: 2, name: \"急救药物使用手册.pdf\", type: \"internal\" },\n      { id: 3, name: \"案例分析资料.pdf\", type: \"internal\" }\n    ],\n    relatedVideos: [\n      { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"35分钟\" },\n      { id: 6, title: \"创伤急救技术\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"45分钟\" },\n      { id: 7, title: \"医疗团队协作\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"30分钟\" }\n    ]\n  }\n\n  // 模拟从本地存储获取播放进度\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const savedProgress = localStorage.getItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;)\n    if (savedProgress) {\n      const savedTime = Number.parseFloat(savedProgress)\n      setCurrentTime(savedTime)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = savedTime\n      }\n    }\n  }, [params.id])\n\n  // 处理视频时间更新\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime\n      setCurrentTime(current)\n      setProgress((current / duration) * 100)\n      \n      // 保存播放进度到本地存储\n      localStorage.setItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;, current.toString())\n      \n      // 非会员时间限制检查\n      if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 current \u003e= timeLimit \u0026\u0026 !showLimitWarning) {\n        videoRef.current.pause()\n        setIsPlaying(false)\n        setShowLimitWarning(true)\n      }\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 76,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 模拟视频数据，实际应从API获取\n  const videoData = {\n    id: params.id,\n    title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n    description: \"本课程详细讲解最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法，适合医护人员进阶学习。\",\n    instructor: \"李教授\",\n    date: \"2025-03-15\",\n    duration: \"60分钟\",\n    views: 1245,\n    type: \"external\", // 或 \"internal\"\n    videoUrl: \"/placeholder.mp4\", // 实际应为真实视频URL\n    materials: [\n      { id: 1, name: \"心肺复苏操作指南.pdf\", type: \"external\" },\n      { id: 2, name: \"急救药物使用手册.pdf\", type: \"internal\" },\n      { id: 3, name: \"案例分析资料.pdf\", type: \"internal\" }\n    ],\n    relatedVideos: [\n      { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"35分钟\" },\n      { id: 6, title: \"创伤急救技术\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"45分钟\" },\n      { id: 7, title: \"医疗团队协作\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"30分钟\" }\n    ]\n  }\n\n  // 模拟从本地存储获取播放进度\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const savedProgress = localStorage.getItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;)\n    if (savedProgress) {\n      const savedTime = Number.parseFloat(savedProgress)\n      setCurrentTime(savedTime)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = savedTime\n      }\n    }\n  }, [params.id])\n\n  // 处理视频时间更新\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime\n      setCurrentTime(current)\n      setProgress((current / duration) * 100)\n      \n      // 保存播放进度到本地存储\n      localStorage.setItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;, current.toString())\n      \n      // 非会员时间限制检查\n      if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 current \u003e= timeLimit \u0026\u0026 !showLimitWarning) {\n        videoRef.current.pause()\n        setIsPlaying(false)\n        setShowLimitWarning(true)\n      }\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 76
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 66,
            "line": 22
          }
        },

      },
      "score": 0.3691405951976776
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",

        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n...\nconst handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n...\nhandleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"container py-8\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cLink href=\"/courses\" className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground\"\u003e\n          \u003cArrowLeft className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n          返回课程列表\n        \u003c/Link\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n      \n      \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"lg:col-span-2 space-y-6\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"relative bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden\"\u003e\n            \u003cvideo\n              ref={videoRef}\n              className=\"w-full aspect-video\"\n              poster=\"/placeholder.svg?height=400\u0026width=800\"\n              onTimeUpdate={handleTimeUpdate}\n              onLoadedMetadata={handleLoadedMetadata}\n              onClick={() =\u003e {\n                if (videoRef.current) {\n                  if (isPlaying) {\n                    videoRef.current.pause()\n                  } else {\n                    videoRef.current.play()\n                  }\n                  setIsPlaying(!isPlaying)\n                }\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003csource src={videoData.videoUrl} type=\"video/mp4\" /\u003e\n              您的浏览器不支持视频播放。\n            \u003c/video\u003e\n            \n            {showLimitWarning \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cdiv className=\"absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/80 text-white p-6 text-center\"\u003e\n                \u003cLock className=\"h-16 w-16 mb-4\" /\u003e\n                \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e免费预览已结束\u003c/h3\u003e\n                \u003cp className=\"mb-4\"\u003e成为会员后可以观看完整视频内容\u003c/p\u003e\n                \u003cLink href=\"/register\"\u003e\n                  \u003cButton\u003e立即注册会员\u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/Link\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            )}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"container py-8\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cLink href=\"/courses\" className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground\"\u003e\n          \u003cArrowLeft className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n          返回课程列表\n        \u003c/Link\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n      \n      \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"lg:col-span-2 space-y-6\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"relative bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden\"\u003e\n            \u003cvideo\n              ref={videoRef}\n              className=\"w-full aspect-video\"\n              poster=\"/placeholder.svg?height=400\u0026width=800\"\n              onTimeUpdate={handleTimeUpdate}\n              onLoadedMetadata={handleLoadedMetadata}\n              onClick={() =\u003e {\n                if (videoRef.current) {\n                  if (isPlaying) {\n                    videoRef.current.pause()\n                  } else {\n                    videoRef.current.play()\n                  }\n                  setIsPlaying(!isPlaying)\n                }\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003csource src={videoData.videoUrl} type=\"video/mp4\" /\u003e\n              您的浏览器不支持视频播放。\n            \u003c/video\u003e\n            \n            {showLimitWarning \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cdiv className=\"absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/80 text-white p-6 text-center\"\u003e\n                \u003cLock className=\"h-16 w-16 mb-4\" /\u003e\n                \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e免费预览已结束\u003c/h3\u003e\n                \u003cp className=\"mb-4\"\u003e成为会员后可以观看完整视频内容\u003c/p\u003e\n                \u003cLink href=\"/register\"\u003e\n                  \u003cButton\u003e立即注册会员\u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/Link\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            )}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

            "line": 115

      "score": 0.3642578125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE materials (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    video_id INT COMMENT '关联的视频ID',\n    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '资料描述',\n    file_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',\n    file_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '文件类型',\n    file_size INT COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',\n    download_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type)\n) COMMENT='学习资料表';\n\n-- 视频观看记录表\nCREATE TABLE watch_history (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    progress INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看进度(秒)',\n    completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否完成观看',\n    last_watched DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后观看时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_last_watched (last_watched)\n) COMMENT='视频观看记录表';\n\n-- 用户笔记表\n",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 处理视频加载元数据\n  const handleLoadedMetadata = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      setDuration(videoRef.current.duration)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 格式化时间显示\n  const formatTime = (time: number) =\u003e {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(time / 60)\n    const seconds = Math.floor(time % 60)\n    return &#96;${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}&#96;\n  }\n\n  // 处理进度条点击\n  const handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内  =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = Math.min(clickPosition * duration, timeLimit)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    } else {\n      // 会员可以自由跳转\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = clickPosition * duration\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 处理视频加载元数据\n  const handleLoadedMetadata = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      setDuration(videoRef.current.duration)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 格式化时间显示\n  const formatTime = (time: number) =\u003e {\n    const minutes = Math.floor(time / 60)\n    const seconds = Math.floor(time % 60)\n    return &#96;${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}&#96;\n  }\n\n  // 处理进度条点击\n  const handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内  =\u003e {\n    if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 timeLimit \u003c duration) {\n      // 非会员只能在限制时间内\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = Math.min(clickPosition * duration, timeLimit)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    } else {\n      // 会员可以自由跳转\n      const clickPosition = e.nativeEvent.offsetX / e.currentTarget.offsetWidth\n      const newTime = clickPosition * duration\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = newTime\n        setCurrentTime(newTime)\n        setProgress((newTime / duration) * 100)\n      }\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 模拟视频数据，实际应从API获取\n  const videoData = {\n    id: params.id,\n    title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n    description: \"本课程详细讲解最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法，适合医护人员进阶学习。\",\n    instructor: \"李教授\",\n    date: \"2025-03-15\",\n    duration: \"60分钟\",\n    views: 1245,\n    type: \"external\", // 或 \"internal\"\n    videoUrl: \"/placeholder.mp4\", // 实际应为真实视频URL\n    materials: [\n      { id: 1, name: \"心肺复苏操作指南.pdf\", type: \"external\" },\n      { id: 2, name: \"急救药物使用手册.pdf\", type: \"internal\" },\n      { id: 3, name: \"案例分析资料.pdf\", type: \"internal\" }\n    ],\n    relatedVideos: [\n      { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"35分钟\" },\n      { id: 6, title: \"创伤急救技术\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"45分钟\" },\n      { id: 7, title: \"医疗团队协作\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"30分钟\" }\n    ]\n  }\n\n  // 模拟从本地存储获取播放进度\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const savedProgress = localStorage.getItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;)\n    if (savedProgress) {\n      const savedTime = Number.parseFloat(savedProgress)\n      setCurrentTime(savedTime)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = savedTime\n      }\n    }\n  }, [params.id])\n\n  // 处理视频时间更新\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime\n      setCurrentTime(current)\n      setProgress((current / duration) * 100)\n      \n      // 保存播放进度到本地存储\n      localStorage.setItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;, current.toString())\n      \n      // 非会员时间限制检查\n      if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 current \u003e= timeLimit \u0026\u0026 !showLimitWarning) {\n        videoRef.current.pause()\n        setIsPlaying(false)\n        setShowLimitWarning(true)\n      }\n    }\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download, Lock } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n  const videoRef = useRef\u003cHTMLVideoElement\u003e(null)\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false)\n  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(0)\n  const [duration, setDuration] = useState(0)\n  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0)\n  const [isMember, setIsMember] = useState(false) // 模拟用户状态，实际应从API获取\n  const [timeLimit, setTimeLimit] = useState(300) // 非会员5分钟限制（300秒）\n  const [showLimitWarning, setShowLimitWarning] = useState(false)",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download, Lock } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n  const videoRef = useRef\u003cHTMLVideoElement\u003e(null)\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false)\n  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(0)\n  const [duration, setDuration] = useState(0)\n  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0)\n  const [isMember, setIsMember] = useState(false) // 模拟用户状态，实际应从API获取\n  const [timeLimit, setTimeLimit] = useState(300) // 非会员5分钟限制（300秒）\n  const [showLimitWarning, setShowLimitWarning] = useState(false)",

        "originalContents": "\n\n      \u003cCard\u003e\n        \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n          \u003cCardTitle\u003e视频列表\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n          \u003cCardDescription\u003e查看和管理所有视频课程\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n        \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n        \u003cCardContent\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-6\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"relative flex-1\"\u003e\n              \u003cSearch className=\"absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground\" /\u003e\n              \u003cInput type=\"search\" placeholder=\"搜索视频...\" className=\"pl-8\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cButton variant=\"outline\"\u003e筛选\u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n\n          \u003cdiv className=\"rounded-md border\"\u003e\n            \u003cTable\u003e\n              \u003cTableHeader\u003e\n                \u003cTableRow\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e标题\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e讲师\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e时长\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e上传日期\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e观看次数\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e类型\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e操作\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                \u003c/TableRow\u003e\n              \u003c/TableHeader\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 评论相关 API\r\nexport const commentApi = {\r\n  getComments: (videoId: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/comments&#96;),\r\n  createComment: (videoId: number, data: { content: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/comments&#96;, data),\r\n  deleteComment: (commentId: number) =\u003e api.delete(&#96;/api/comments/${commentId}&#96;),\r\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideosPage() {\n  // 模拟视频数据\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-15\",\n      views: 1245,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-20\",\n      views: 987,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-05\",\n      views: 876,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-10\",\n      views: 765,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 5,\n      title: \"急救药物使用指南\",\n      instructor: \"陈医生\",\n      duration: \"35分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-15\",\n      views: 654,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 6,\n      title: \"创伤急救技术\",\n      instructor: \"赵教授\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-20\",\n      views: 543,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },",

        "originalContents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideosPage() {\n  // 模拟视频数据\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-15\",\n      views: 1245,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-20\",\n      views: 987,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-05\",\n      views: 876,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-10\",\n      views: 765,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 5,\n      title: \"急救药物使用指南\",\n      instructor: \"陈医生\",\n      duration: \"35分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-15\",\n      views: 654,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 6,\n      title: \"创伤急救技术\",\n      instructor: \"赵教授\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-20\",\n      views: 543,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n...\nconst handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n...\nhandleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n\n          \n          ...\n\n          \n          \u003cTabs defaultValue=\"materials\"\u003e\n            \u003cTabsList\u003e\n              \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"materials\"\u003e学习资料\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"notes\"\u003e笔记\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"comments\"\u003e讨论\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n            \u003c/TabsList\u003e\n            \u003cTabsContent value=\"materials\" className=\"space-y-4\"\u003e\n              \u003ch3 className=\"font-medium\"\u003e可下载资料\u003c/h3\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n                {videoData.materials.map((material) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cdiv key={material.id} className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-3 border rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                    \u003cspan\u003e{material.name}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    {material.type === \"internal\" \u0026\u0026 !isMember ? (\n                      \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" disabled\u003e\n                        \u003cLock className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                        会员专享\n                      \u003c/Button\u003e\n                    ) : (\n                      \u003cButton variant=\"outline\"\u003e\n                        \u003cDownload className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                        下载\n                      \u003c/Button\u003e\n                    )}\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                ))}\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n            \u003cTabsContent value=\"notes\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"p-4 border rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e您可以在这里记录学习笔记\u003c/p\u003e\n                \u003ctextarea \n                  className=\"w-full mt-2 p-2 border rounded-md\" \n                  rows={6} \n                  placeholder=\"输入您的笔记...\"\n                /\u003e\n                \u003cButton className=\"mt-2\"\u003e保存笔记\u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/TabsContent\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;video_tags&#96; VALUES (18, '康复指导', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for videos\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;videos&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;videos&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;title&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\r\n  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '视频描述',\r\n  &#96;category_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '分类ID',\r\n  &#96;instructor_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '讲师ID',\r\n  &#96;duration&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\r\n  &#96;video_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\r\n  &#96;thumbnail_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '缩略图URL',\r\n  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\r\n  &#96;views&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('draft','published','archived') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\r\n  &#96;upload_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_category_id&#96;(&#96;category_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  FULLTEXT INDEX &#96;ft_video_search&#96;(&#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;),\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;category_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;video_categories&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "INSERT INTO &#96;video_tags&#96; VALUES (18, '康复指导', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557,
            "text": "-- ----------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "-- Table structure for videos\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "-- ----------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;videos&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE &#96;videos&#96;  (\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562,
            "text": "  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "  &#96;title&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '视频描述',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "  &#96;category_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '分类ID',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "  &#96;instructor_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '讲师ID',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "  &#96;duration&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568,
            "text": "  &#96;video_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "  &#96;thumbnail_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '缩略图URL',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570,
            "text": "  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "  &#96;views&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572,
            "text": "  &#96;status&#96; enum('draft','published','archived') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "  &#96;upload_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_category_id&#96;(&#96;category_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "  FULLTEXT INDEX &#96;ft_video_search&#96;(&#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582,
            "text": "  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;category_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;video_categories&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "INSERT INTO &#96;video_tags&#96; VALUES (18, '康复指导', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for videos\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;videos&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;videos&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;title&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\r\n  &#96;description&#96; text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL COMMENT '视频描述',\r\n  &#96;category_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '分类ID',\r\n  &#96;instructor_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '讲师ID',\r\n  &#96;duration&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\r\n  &#96;video_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\r\n  &#96;thumbnail_url&#96; varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '缩略图URL',\r\n  &#96;access_type&#96; enum('external','internal') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\r\n  &#96;views&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('draft','published','archived') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\r\n  &#96;upload_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_category_id&#96;(&#96;category_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  FULLTEXT INDEX &#96;ft_video_search&#96;(&#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;),\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;category_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;video_categories&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { Play } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function FeaturedVideos() {\n  // 这里模拟视频数据，实际应用中会从API获取\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      description: \"学习基本的护理技能和操作流程，适合初级医护人员\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      description: \"掌握最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      description: \"详细讲解常见医疗设备的使用方法和注意事项\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"internal\", // 内部资料，仅会员可观看\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      description: \"提升与患者沟通的能力，建立良好的医患关系\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n  ]",

        "originalContents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { Play } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function FeaturedVideos() {\n  // 这里模拟视频数据，实际应用中会从API获取\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      description: \"学习基本的护理技能和操作流程，适合初级医护人员\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      description: \"掌握最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      description: \"详细讲解常见医疗设备的使用方法和注意事项\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"internal\", // 内部资料，仅会员可观看\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      description: \"提升与患者沟通的能力，建立良好的医患关系\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350\",\n      type: \"external\", // 外部资料，非会员可观看5分钟\n    },\n  ]",

        "contents": "export default function AdminDashboard() {\n...\nfunction AdminDashboard() {\n  // 模拟数据\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 热门视频\n  const popularVideos = [\n    { id: 1, title: \"基础护理技能培训\", views: 1245, duration: \"45分钟\", completionRate: \"78%\" },\n    { id: 2, title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\", views: 987, duration: \"60分钟\", completionRate: \"65%\" },\n    { id: 3, title: \"医疗设备操作指南\", views: 876, duration: \"50分钟\", completionRate: \"72%\" },\n    { id: 4, title: \"患者沟通技巧\", views: 765, duration: \"40分钟\", completionRate: \"81%\" },\n    { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", views: 654, duration: \"35分钟\", completionRate: \"69%\" },\n  ]\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight\"\u003e管理员仪表盘\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e查看网站数据和管理内容\u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton\u003e添加新视频\u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 热门视频\n  const popularVideos = [\n    { id: 1, title: \"基础护理技能培训\", views: 1245, duration: \"45分钟\", completionRate: \"78%\" },\n    { id: 2, title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\", views: 987, duration: \"60分钟\", completionRate: \"65%\" },\n    { id: 3, title: \"医疗设备操作指南\", views: 876, duration: \"50分钟\", completionRate: \"72%\" },\n    { id: 4, title: \"患者沟通技巧\", views: 765, duration: \"40分钟\", completionRate: \"81%\" },\n    { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", views: 654, duration: \"35分钟\", completionRate: \"69%\" },\n  ]\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight\"\u003e管理员仪表盘\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e查看网站数据和管理内容\u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton\u003e添加新视频\u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n...\nconst handleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n...\nhandleProgressClick = (e: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n\n            \n            ...\n\n            \n            \u003cdiv className=\"absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/60 p-4 text-white\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-2\"\u003e\n                \u003cspan\u003e{formatTime(currentTime)}\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan\u003e{formatTime(duration)}\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cdiv \n                className=\"h-2 bg-muted rounded-full cursor-pointer\"\n                onClick={handleProgressClick}\n              \u003e\n                \u003cdiv \n                  className=\"h-full bg-primary rounded-full\" \n                  style={{ width: &#96;${progress}%&#96; }}\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n          \n          \u003cdiv\u003e\n            \u003ch1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{videoData.title}\u003c/h1\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4\"\u003e\n              \u003cBadge variant=\"outline\"\u003e{videoData.instructor}\u003c/Badge\u003e\n              \u003cBadge variant=\"outline\"\u003e{videoData.duration}\u003c/Badge\u003e\n              \u003cBadge variant=\"outline\"\u003e{videoData.views} 次观看\u003c/Badge\u003e\n              {videoData.type === \"internal\" \u0026\u0026 (\n                \u003cBadge variant=\"secondary\"\u003e会员专享\u003c/Badge\u003e\n              )}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e{videoData.description}\u003c/p\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频分类表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class VideoCategories implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类名称\r\n     */\r\n    private String name;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 父分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer parentId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 显示顺序\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer displayOrder;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频分类表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class VideoCategories implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类名称\r\n     */\r\n    private String name;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 父分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer parentId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 显示顺序\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer displayOrder;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Videos;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.IService;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表 服务类\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\npublic interface VideosService extends IService\u003cVideos\u003e {\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 16
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",

        "originalContents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",

ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_instructor_id&#96;(&#96;instructor_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_access_type&#96;(&#96;access_type&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96;         "contents": "export default function AdminDashboard() {\n...\nfunction AdminDashboard() {\n  // 模拟数据\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cTabsContent value=\"videos\"
