\u003cCardDescription\u003e查看最受欢迎的视频课程\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n            \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"overflow-x-auto\"\u003e\n                \u003ctable className=\"w-full\"\u003e\n                  \u003cthead\u003e\n                    \u003ctr className=\"border-b\"\u003e\n                      \u003cth className=\"px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium\"\u003e视频标题\u003c/th\u003e\n                      \u003cth className=\"px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium\"\u003e观看次数\u003c/th\u003e\n                      \u003cth className=\"px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium\"\u003e时长\u003c/th\u003e\n                      \u003cth className=\"px-4         "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

```json
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Videos implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频标题\r\n     */\r\n    private String title;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频描述\r\n     */\r\n    private String description;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分类ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer categoryId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 讲师ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer instructorId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 时长(秒)\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer duration;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 视频URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String videoUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 缩略图URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String thumbnailUrl;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)\r\n     */\r\n    private String accessType;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 观看次数\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer views;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 上传时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date uploadDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideosPage() {\n  // 模拟视频数据\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-15\",\n      views: 1245,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-20\",\n      views: 987,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-05\",\n      views: 876,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-10\",\n      views: 765,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 5,\n      title: \"急救药物使用指南\",\n      instructor: \"陈医生\",\n      duration: \"35分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-15\",\n      views: 654,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 6,\n      title: \"创伤急救技术\",\n      instructor: \"赵教授\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-20\",\n      views: 543,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "import Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\n\nexport default function VideosPage() {\n  // 模拟视频数据\n  const videos = [\n    {\n      id: 1,\n      title: \"基础护理技能培训\",\n      instructor: \"王医生\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-15\",\n      views: 1245,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 2,\n      title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n      instructor: \"李教授\",\n      duration: \"60分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-01-20\",\n      views: 987,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 3,\n      title: \"医疗设备操作指南\",\n      instructor: \"张主任\",\n      duration: \"50分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-05\",\n      views: 876,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 4,\n      title: \"患者沟通技巧\",\n      instructor: \"刘医生\",\n      duration: \"40分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-10\",\n      views: 765,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 5,\n      title: \"急救药物使用指南\",\n      instructor: \"陈医生\",\n      duration: \"35分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-15\",\n      views: 654,\n      type: \"internal\",\n    },\n    {\n      id: 6,\n      title: \"创伤急救技术\",\n      instructor: \"赵教授\",\n      duration: \"45分钟\",\n      uploadDate: \"2025-02-20\",\n      views: 543,\n      type: \"external\",\n    },",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": ") COMMENT='讲师表';"

            "lineNumber": 98,

          },

            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,

            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": ") COMMENT='视频表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,

          {

        "originalContents": ") COMMENT='讲师表';\n\n-- 视频表\nCREATE TABLE videos (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '视频描述',\n    category_id INT COMMENT '分类ID',\n    instructor_id INT COMMENT '讲师ID',\n    duration INT NOT NULL COMMENT '时长(秒)',\n    video_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频URL',\n    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '缩略图URL',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员)',\n    views INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看次数',\n    status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'published' COMMENT '状态',\n    upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    FOREIGN KEY (instructor_id) REFERENCES instructors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_category_id (category_id),\n    INDEX idx_instructor_id (instructor_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    FULLTEXT INDEX ft_video_search (title, description)\n) COMMENT='视频表';\n\n-- 视频标签表\nCREATE TABLE video_tags (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    UNIQUE INDEX idx_name (name)\n) COMMENT='视频标签表';\n\n-- 视频-标签关联表\nCREATE TABLE video_tag_relations (\n    video_id INT NOT NULL,\n    tag_id INT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (video_id, tag_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES video_tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\n) COMMENT='视频-标签关联表';\n\n-- 学习资料表\n",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function FeaturedVideos() {\n...\nfunction FeaturedVideos() {\n  // 这里模拟视频数据，实际应用中会从API获取\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4\"\u003e\n      {videos.map((video) =\u003e (\n        \u003cCard key={video.id} className=\"overflow-hidden\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"relative\"\u003e\n            \u003cimg\n              src={video.thumbnail || \"/placeholder.svg\"}\n              alt={video.title}\n              className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover\"\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/30 opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\"\u003e\n              \u003cButton size=\"icon\" variant=\"secondary\" className=\"rounded-full\"\u003e\n                \u003cPlay className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e\n                \u003cspan className=\"sr-only\"\u003e播放视频\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            {video.type === \"internal\" \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cBadge className=\"absolute top-2 right-2\" variant=\"secondary\"\u003e\n                会员专享\n              \u003c/Badge\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cCardHeader className=\"p-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cCardTitle className=\"line-clamp-1 text-lg\"\u003e{video.title}\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n            \u003cCardDescription className=\"line-clamp-2\"\u003e{video.description}\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n          \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n          \u003cCardContent className=\"p-4 pt-0 text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"flex justify-between\"\u003e\n              \u003cspan\u003e{video.instructor}\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003cspan\u003e{video.duration}\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003cCardFooter className=\"p-4 pt-0\"\u003e\n            \u003cLink href={&#96;/video/${video.id}&#96;} className=\"w-full\"\u003e\n              \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" className=\"w-full\"\u003e\n                {video.type === \"internal\" ? \"会员可观看\" : \"免费观看5分钟\"}\n              \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003c/Link\u003e\n          \u003c/CardFooter\u003e\n        \u003c/Card\u003e\n      ))}\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

          },
          {

            "text": "            \u003cimg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "              src={video.thumbnail || \"/placeholder.svg\"}"

        "originalContents": "\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4\"\u003e\n      {videos.map((video) =\u003e (\n        \u003cCard key={video.id} className=\"overflow-hidden\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"relative\"\u003e\n            \u003cimg\n              src={video.thumbnail || \"/placeholder.svg\"}\n opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\"\u003e\n              \u003cButton size=\"icon\" variant=\"secondary\" className=\"rounded-full\"\u003e\n                \u003cPlay className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e\n                \u003cspan className=\"sr-only\"\u003e播放视频\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            {video.type === \"internal\" \u0026\u0026 (\n              \u003cBadge className=\"absolute top-2 right-2\" variant=\"secondary\"\u003e\n                会员专享\n              \u003c/Badge\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cCardHeader className=\"p-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cCardTitle className=\"line-clamp-1 text-lg\"\u003e{video.title}\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n            \u003cCardDescription className=\"line-clamp-2\"\u003e{video.description}\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n          \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n          \u003cCardContent className=\"p-4 pt-0 text-sm       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "('刘医生', '副主任医师', '深圳市人民医院', '心理学博士，擅长医患沟通和医疗团队建设', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n('陈医生', '主治医师', '武汉协和医院', '药学硕士，擅长急救药物使用和临床用药指导', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100');\n\n-- 插入视频\nINSERT INTO videos (title, description, category_id, instructor_id, duration, video_url, thumbnail_url, access_type, views, status) VALUES\n('基础护理技能培训', '学习基本的护理技能和操作流程，适合初级医护人员', 1, 3, 2700, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 1245, 'published'),\n('高级心肺复苏技术', '掌握最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法', 2, 2, 3600, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 987, 'published'),\n('医疗设备操作指南', '详细讲解常见医疗设备的使用方法和注意事项', 3, 3, 3000, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 876, 'published'),\n('患者沟通技巧', '提升与患者沟通的能力，建立良好的医患关系', 4, 4, 2400, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 765, 'published'),\n('急救药物使用指南', '详细讲解急救药物的使用方法、适应症和注意事项', 2, 5, 2100, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 654, 'published'),\n('创伤急救技术', '学习各类创伤的急救处理方法和技巧', 2, 1, 2700, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 543, 'published'),\n('医疗团队协作', '提升医疗团队协作能力，提高工作效率', 4, 4, 1800, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 432, 'published'),\n('医疗记录规范', '学习医疗记录的书写规范和注意事项', 1, 2, 1500, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 321, 'published');\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 模拟视频数据，实际应从API获取\n  const videoData = {\n    id: params.id,\n    title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n    description: \"本课程详细讲解最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法，适合医护人员进阶学习。\",\n    instructor: \"李教授\",\n    date: \"2025-03-15\",\n    duration: \"60分钟\",\n    views: 1245,\n    type: \"external\", // 或 \"internal\"\n    videoUrl: \"/placeholder.mp4\", // 实际应为真实视频URL\n    materials: [\n      { id: 1, name: \"心肺复苏操作指南.pdf\", type: \"external\" },\n      { id: 2, name: \"急救药物使用手册.pdf\", type: \"internal\" },\n      { id: 3, name: \"案例分析资料.pdf\", type: \"internal\" }\n    ],\n    relatedVideos: [\n      { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"35分钟\" },\n      { id: 6, title: \"创伤急救技术\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"45分钟\" },\n      { id: 7, title: \"医疗团队协作\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"30分钟\" }\n    ]\n  }\n\n  // 模拟从本地存储获取播放进度\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const savedProgress = localStorage.getItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;)\n    if (savedProgress) {\n      const savedTime = Number.parseFloat(savedProgress)\n      setCurrentTime(savedTime)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = savedTime\n      }\n    }\n  }, [params.id])\n\n  // 处理视频时间更新\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime\n      setCurrentTime(current)\n      setProgress((current / duration) * 100)\n      \n      // 保存播放进度到本地存储\n      localStorage.setItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;, current.toString())\n      \n      // 非会员时间限制检查\n      if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 current \u003e= timeLimit \u0026\u0026 !showLimitWarning) {\n        videoRef.current.pause()\n        setIsPlaying(false)\n        setShowLimitWarning(true)\n      }\n    }\n  }",

          },

            "lineNumber": 54,

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 56,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  }, [params.id])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  // 处理视频时间更新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    if (videoRef.current) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime"
          },

          },

            "text": "      "
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 67,

          },

          },

          {

            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 模拟视频数据，实际应从API获取\n  const videoData = {\n    id: params.id,\n    title: \"高级心肺复苏技术\",\n    description: \"本课程详细讲解最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法，适合医护人员进阶学习。\",\n    instructor: \"李教授\",\n    date: \"2025-03-15\",\n    duration: \"60分钟\",\n    views: 1245,\n    type: \"external\", // 或 \"internal\"\n    videoUrl: \"/placeholder.mp4\", // 实际应为真实视频URL\n    materials: [\n      { id: 1, name: \"心肺复苏操作指南.pdf\", type: \"external\" },\n      { id: 2, name: \"急救药物使用手册.pdf\", type: \"internal\" },\n      { id: 3, name: \"案例分析资料.pdf\", type: \"internal\" }\n    ],\n    relatedVideos: [\n      { id: 5, title: \"急救药物使用指南\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"35分钟\" },\n      { id: 6, title: \"创伤急救技术\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"45分钟\" },\n      { id: 7, title: \"医疗团队协作\", thumbnail: \"/placeholder.svg?height=80\u0026width=120\", duration: \"30分钟\" }\n    ]\n  }\n\n  // 模拟从本地存储获取播放进度\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const savedProgress = localStorage.getItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;)\n    if (savedProgress) {\n      const savedTime = Number.parseFloat(savedProgress)\n      setCurrentTime(savedTime)\n      if (videoRef.current) {\n        videoRef.current.currentTime = savedTime\n      }\n    }\n  }, [params.id])\n\n  // 处理视频时间更新\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () =\u003e {\n    if (videoRef.current) {\n      const current = videoRef.current.currentTime\n      setCurrentTime(current)\n      setProgress((current / duration) * 100)\n      \n      // 保存播放进度到本地存储\n      localStorage.setItem(&#96;video-progress-${params.id}&#96;, current.toString())\n      \n      // 非会员时间限制检查\n      if (!isMember \u0026\u0026 current \u003e= timeLimit \u0026\u0026 !showLimitWarning) {\n        videoRef.current.pause()\n        setIsPlaying(false)\n        setShowLimitWarning(true)\n      }\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 76
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 66,
            "line": 22
          }
        },

      },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "  CONSTRAINT &#96;videos_ibfk_2&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;instructor_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;instructors&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r\n) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 21 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '视频表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Records of videos\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (1, '基础护理技能培训', '学习基本的护理技能和操作流程，适合初级医护人员', 1, 3, 2700, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 1245, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (2, '高级心肺复苏技术', '掌握最新的心肺复苏技术和急救方法', 2, 2, 3600, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 987, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (3, '医疗设备操作指南', '详细讲解常见医疗设备的使用方法和注意事项', 3, 3, 3000, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 876, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (4, '患者沟通技巧', '提升与患者沟通的能力，建立良好的医患关系', 4, 4, 2400, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 765, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (5, '急救药物使用指南', '详细讲解急救药物的使用方法、适应症和注意事项', 2, 5, 2100, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 654, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\n",

        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (6, '创伤急救技术', '学习各类创伤的急救处理方法和技巧', 2, 1, 2700, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 543, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (7, '医疗团队协作', '提升医疗团队协作能力，提高工作效率', 4, 4, 1800, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'internal', 432, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (8, '医疗记录规范', '学习医疗记录的书写规范和注意事项', 1, 2, 1500, '/placeholder.mp4', '/placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=350', 'external', 321, 'published', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50', '2025-05-08 16:38:50');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (9, '内科护理核心技能', '详细讲解内科护理的核心技能和常见问题处理方法', 6, 1, 3200, '/videos/internal_nursing.mp4', '/thumbnails/internal_nursing.jpg', 'internal', 1420, 'published', '2025-04-23 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (10, '外科换药技术进阶', '学习外科换药的高级技巧和无菌操作要点', 7, 3, 2800, '/videos/surgical_dressing.mp4', '/thumbnails/surgical_dressing.jpg', 'internal', 1150, 'published', '2025-04-24 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (11, '儿科用药安全', '儿科常用药物的使用方法、剂量计算和安全注意事项', 8, 5, 2500, '/videos/pediatric_medication.mp4', '/thumbnails/pediatric_medication.jpg', 'external', 980, 'published', '2025-04-25 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\n",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/videos\")\r\npublic class VideosController {\r\n\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (18, '气管插管操作', '气管插管的正确操作步骤和常见问题处理', 2, 1, 3100, '/videos/intubation.mp4', '/thumbnails/intubation.jpg', 'internal', 920, 'published', '2025-05-02 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (19, '血压测量技巧', '准确测量血压的技巧和常见误差分析', 1, 4, 1800, '/videos/blood_pressure.mp4', '/thumbnails/blood_pressure.jpg', 'external', 1380, 'published', '2025-05-03 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;videos&#96; VALUES (20, '糖尿病患者护理', '糖尿病患者的专业护理和健康教育', 6, 2, 3400, '/videos/diabetes_care.mp4', '/thumbnails/diabetes_care.jpg', 'internal', 720, 'published', '2025-05-04 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for watch_history\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;watch_history&#96;;\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 606,
```

让我先来创建视频上传表单组件：

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,538 @@
- 
+ "use client"
+ 
+ import { useState, useEffect } from "react"
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
+ import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod"
+ import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"
+ import { z } from "zod"
+ import { Loader2, Upload, X } from "lucide-react"
+ 
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
+ import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"
+ import { Form, FormControl, FormDescription, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from "@/components/ui/form"
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
+ import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select"
+ import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"
+ import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch"
+ import { videoApi } from "@/lib/api"
+ import { toast } from "@/components/ui/use-toast"
+ 
+ // 视频表单验证架构
+ const videoFormSchema = z.object({
+   title: z.string().min(3, { message: "标题至少需要3个字符" }).max(100, { message: "标题最多100个字符" }),
+   description: z.string().min(10, { message: "描述至少需要10个字符" }).max(1000, { message: "描述最多1000个字符" }),
+   categoryId: z.string({ required_error: "请选择分类" }),
+   instructorId: z.string({ required_error: "请选择讲师" }),
+   accessType: z.enum(["external", "internal"], { required_error: "请选择访问类型" }),
+   status: z.enum(["draft", "published", "archived"], { required_error: "请选择状态" }),
+   duration: z.number().optional(),
+   videoFile: z.any().optional(),
+   thumbnailFile: z.any().optional(),
+ })
+ 
+ type VideoFormValues = z.infer&lt;typeof videoFormSchema&gt;
+ 
+ interface VideoFormProps {
+   videoId?: number // 如果提供则为编辑模式，否则为新建模式
+   onSuccess?: () =&gt; void
+ }
+ 
+ export function VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {
+   const router = useRouter()
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
+   const [videoPreview, setVideoPreview] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null)
+   const [thumbnailPreview, setThumbnailPreview] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null)
+   const [categories, setCategories] = useState&lt;{id: number, name: string}[]&gt;([])
+   const [instructors, setInstructors] = useState&lt;{id: number, name: string}[]&gt;([])
+   
+   // 初始化表单
+   const form = useForm&lt;VideoFormValues&gt;({
+     resolver: zodResolver(videoFormSchema),
+     defaultValues: {
+       title: "",
+       description: "",
+       categoryId: "",
+       instructorId: "",
+       accessType: "external",
+       status: "draft",
+     },
+   })
+ 
+   // 获取视频分类
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchCategories = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         // 实际项目中这里应该调用API获取分类
+         // const response = await videoApi.getCategories()
+         // setCategories(response.data)
+         
+         // 模拟分类数据
+         setCategories([
+           { id: 1, name: "基础医学" },
+           { id: 2, name: "临床护理" },
+           { id: 3, name: "急救技能" },
+           { id: 4, name: "医疗设备操作" },
+           { id: 5, name: "病患沟通" },
+         ])
+       } catch (error) {
+         console.error("获取视频分类失败", error)
+         toast({
+           variant: "destructive",
+           title: "获取视频分类失败",
+           description: "无法加载视频分类数据，请刷新页面重试",
+         })
+       }
+     }
+     
+     fetchCategories()
+   }, [])
+ 
+   // 获取讲师列表
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchInstructors = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         // 实际项目中这里应该调用API获取讲师列表
+         // const response = await api.getInstructors()
+         // setInstructors(response.data)
+         
+         // 模拟讲师数据
+         setInstructors([
+           { id: 1, name: "张教授" },
+           { id: 2, name: "王医生" },
+           { id: 3, name: "李主任" },
+           { id: 4, name: "赵护士长" },
+           { id: 5, name: "钱医生" },
+         ])
+       } catch (error) {
+         console.error("获取讲师列表失败", error)
+         toast({
+           variant: "destructive",
+           title: "获取讲师列表失败",
+           description: "无法加载讲师数据，请刷新页面重试",
+         })
+       }
+     }
+     
+     fetchInstructors()
+   }, [])
+ 
+   // 如果是编辑模式，加载视频数据
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     if (videoId) {
+       const fetchVideoData = async () =&gt; {
+         try {
+           setIsLoading(true)
+           // 实际项目中这里应该调用API获取视频详情
+           // const response = await videoApi.getVideoById(videoId)
+           // const videoData = response.data
+           
+           // 模拟视频数据
+           const videoData = {
+             id: videoId,
+             title: "医疗团队协作",
+             description: "本视频详细讲解医疗团队协作的重要性和具体方法，适合所有医护人员观看学习。",
+             categoryId: "3",
+             instructorId: "3",
+             accessType: "internal",
+             status: "published",
+             videoUrl: "/placeholder.mp4",
+             thumbnailUrl: "/placeholder.jpg",
+             duration: 1800, // 30分钟
+           }
+           
+           // 设置表单初始值
+           form.reset({
+             title: videoData.title,
+             description: videoData.description,
+             categoryId: videoData.categoryId,
+             instructorId: videoData.instructorId,
+             accessType: videoData.accessType as "external" | "internal",
+             status: videoData.status as "draft" | "published" | "archived",
+             duration: videoData.duration,
+           })
+           
+           // 设置预览
+           setVideoPreview(videoData.videoUrl)
+           setThumbnailPreview(videoData.thumbnailUrl)
+         } catch (error) {
+           console.error("获取视频数据失败", error)
+           toast({
+             variant: "destructive",
+             title: "获取视频数据失败",
+             description: "无法加载视频数据，请刷新页面重试",
+           })
+         } finally {
+           setIsLoading(false)
+         }
+       }
+       
+       fetchVideoData()
+     }
+   }, [videoId, form])
+ 
+   // 处理视频文件上传预览
+   const handleVideoFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;) =&gt; {
+     const file = e.target.files?.[0]
+     if (file) {
+       form.setValue("videoFile", file)
+       const videoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file)
+       setVideoPreview(videoUrl)
+       
+       // 获取视频时长
+       const video = document.createElement("video")
+       video.onloadedmetadata = () =&gt; {
+         form.setValue("duration", Math.floor(video.duration))
+       }
+       video.src = videoUrl
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   // 处理缩略图文件上传预览
+   const handleThumbnailFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;) =&gt; {
+     const file = e.target.files?.[0]
+     if (file) {
+       form.setValue("thumbnailFile", file)
+       const imageUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file)
+       setThumbnailPreview(imageUrl)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   // 清除视频预览
+   const clearVideoPreview = () =&gt; {
+     form.setValue("videoFile", undefined)
+     if (videoPreview &amp;&amp; !videoPreview.startsWith("/")) {
+       URL.revokeObjectURL(videoPreview)
+     }
+     setVideoPreview(null)
+   }
+ 
+   // 清除缩略图预览
+   const clearThumbnailPreview = () =&gt; {
+     form.setValue("thumbnailFile", undefined)
+     if (thumbnailPreview &amp;&amp; !thumbnailPreview.startsWith("/")) {
+       URL.revokeObjectURL(thumbnailPreview)
+     }
+     setThumbnailPreview(null)
+   }
+ 
+   // 提交表单
+   const onSubmit = async (data: VideoFormValues) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       setIsLoading(true)
+       
+       // 创建FormData实例用于文件上传
+       const formData = new FormData()
+       formData.append("title", data.title)
+       formData.append("description", data.description)
+       formData.append("categoryId", data.categoryId)
+       formData.append("instructorId", data.instructorId)
+       formData.append("accessType", data.accessType)
+       formData.append("status", data.status)
+       
+       if (data.duration) {
+         formData.append("duration", data.duration.toString())
+       }
+       
+       if (data.videoFile) {
+         formData.append("videoFile", data.videoFile)
+       }
+       
+       if (data.thumbnailFile) {
+         formData.append("thumbnailFile", data.thumbnailFile)
+       }
+       
+       if (videoId) {
+         // 更新现有视频
+         // await videoApi.updateVideo(videoId, formData)
+         console.log("更新视频数据", formData)
+         toast({
+           title: "视频更新成功",
+           description: "视频信息已成功更新",
+         })
+       } else {
+         // 创建新视频
+         // await videoApi.createVideo(formData)
+         console.log("创建新视频", formData)
+         toast({
+           title: "视频创建成功",
+           description: "新视频已成功上传到系统",
+         })
+       }
+       
+       // 调用成功回调或跳转
+       if (onSuccess) {
+         onSuccess()
+       } else {
+         router.push("/admin/videos")
+       }
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("提交视频表单失败", error)
+       toast({
+         variant: "destructive",
+         title: "操作失败",
+         description: videoId ? "更新视频失败，请重试" : "上传视频失败，请重试",
+       })
+     } finally {
+       setIsLoading(false)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;Form {...form}&gt;
+       &lt;form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="space-y-6 md:col-span-1"&gt;
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="title"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;视频标题&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Input placeholder="请输入视频标题" {...field} /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormDescription&gt;简洁明了的标题能吸引更多观看&lt;/FormDescription&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+             
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="description"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;视频描述&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Textarea placeholder="请输入视频详细描述" {...field} className="h-32" /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormDescription&gt;详细描述视频内容，方便用户了解和搜索&lt;/FormDescription&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+             
+             &lt;div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2"&gt;
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="categoryId"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;视频分类&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;Select 
+                       onValueChange={field.onChange} 
+                       defaultValue={field.value}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                           &lt;SelectValue placeholder="选择视频分类" /&gt;
+                         &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                         {categories.map((category) =&gt; (
+                           &lt;SelectItem key={category.id} value={category.id.toString()}&gt;
+                             {category.name}
+                           &lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                         ))}
+                       &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                     &lt;/Select&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+               
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="instructorId"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;讲师&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;Select 
+                       onValueChange={field.onChange} 
+                       defaultValue={field.value}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                           &lt;SelectValue placeholder="选择讲师" /&gt;
+                         &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                         {instructors.map((instructor) =&gt; (
+                           &lt;SelectItem key={instructor.id} value={instructor.id.toString()}&gt;
+                             {instructor.name}
+                           &lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                         ))}
+                       &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                     &lt;/Select&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             
+             &lt;div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2"&gt;
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="accessType"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;访问类型&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;Select 
+                       onValueChange={field.onChange} 
+                       defaultValue={field.value}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                           &lt;SelectValue placeholder="选择访问类型" /&gt;
+                         &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectItem value="external"&gt;公开课程（非会员可观看5分钟）&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectItem value="internal"&gt;会员专享&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                       &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                     &lt;/Select&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+               
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="status"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;状态&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;Select 
+                       onValueChange={field.onChange} 
+                       defaultValue={field.value}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                           &lt;SelectValue placeholder="选择状态" /&gt;
+                         &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectItem value="draft"&gt;草稿&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectItem value="published"&gt;已发布&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                         &lt;SelectItem value="archived"&gt;已归档&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                       &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                     &lt;/Select&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           
+           &lt;div className="space-y-6 md:col-span-1"&gt;
+             &lt;FormItem&gt;
+               &lt;FormLabel&gt;视频文件&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+               &lt;div className="mt-2"&gt;
+                 {videoPreview ? (
+                   &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                     &lt;video 
+                       src={videoPreview} 
+                       className="w-full h-auto rounded-md border border-border" 
+                       controls
+                     /&gt;
+                     &lt;button
+                       type="button"
+                       className="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-black/50 p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-black/70"
+                       onClick={clearVideoPreview}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;X className="h-5 w-5 text-white" /&gt;
+                     &lt;/button&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ) : (
+                   &lt;Card className="border-dashed"&gt;
+                     &lt;CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6"&gt;
+                       &lt;Upload className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mb-2" /&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;点击选择或拖拽视频文件到这里&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1"&gt;支持 MP4, WebM 格式，最大 500MB&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;Input
+                         type="file"
+                         className="hidden"
+                         id="video-upload"
+                         accept="video/mp4,video/webm"
+                         onChange={handleVideoFileChange}
+                       /&gt;
+                       &lt;Button
+                         type="button"
+                         variant="outline"
+                         className="mt-4"
+                         onClick={() =&gt; document.getElementById("video-upload")?.click()}
+                       &gt;
+                         选择视频文件
+                       &lt;/Button&gt;
+                     &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+                   &lt;/Card&gt;
+                 )}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;FormDescription&gt;上传高质量的视频文件，系统支持自动转码&lt;/FormDescription&gt;
+             &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+             
+             &lt;FormItem&gt;
+               &lt;FormLabel&gt;缩略图&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+               &lt;div className="mt-2"&gt;
+                 {thumbnailPreview ? (
+                   &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                     &lt;img 
+                       src={thumbnailPreview} 
+                       alt="视频缩略图" 
+                       className="w-full h-auto rounded-md border border-border object-cover aspect-video" 
+                     /&gt;
+                     &lt;button
+                       type="button"
+                       className="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-black/50 p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-black/70"
+                       onClick={clearThumbnailPreview}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;X className="h-5 w-5 text-white" /&gt;
+                     &lt;/button&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ) : (
+                   &lt;Card className="border-dashed"&gt;
+                     &lt;CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6"&gt;
+                       &lt;Upload className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mb-2" /&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;点击选择或拖拽图片文件到这里&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1"&gt;支持 JPG, PNG 格式，建议尺寸 1280×720&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;Input
+                         type="file"
+                         className="hidden"
+                         id="thumbnail-upload"
+                         accept="image/jpeg,image/png"
+                         onChange={handleThumbnailFileChange}
+                       /&gt;
+                       &lt;Button
+                         type="button"
+                         variant="outline"
+                         className="mt-4"
+                         onClick={() =&gt; document.getElementById("thumbnail-upload")?.click()}
+                       &gt;
+                         选择缩略图
+                       &lt;/Button&gt;
+                     &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+                   &lt;/Card&gt;
+                 )}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;FormDescription&gt;上传视频的封面图片，如不上传将自动从视频中截取&lt;/FormDescription&gt;
+             &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         
+         &lt;div className="flex justify-end gap-2"&gt;
+           &lt;Button
+             type="button"
+             variant="outline"
+             onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/admin/videos")}
+           &gt;
+             取消
+           &lt;/Button&gt;
+           &lt;Button type="submit" disabled={isLoading}&gt;
+             {isLoading &amp;&amp; &lt;Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /&gt;}
+             {videoId ? "更新视频" : "上传视频"}
+           &lt;/Button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/form&gt;
+     &lt;/Form&gt;
+   )
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,449 @@
- 
+ "use client"
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react"
+ import Link from "next/link"
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
+ import { ChevronLeft, Edit, Trash2, Play, Eye, Download, Tag, Users, Calendar, Clock, FileText } from "lucide-react"
+ 
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
+ import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
+ import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs"
+ import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
+ import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
+ import { toast } from "@/components/ui/use-toast"
+ import { videoApi } from "@/lib/api"
+ 
+ export default function VideoDetailsPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
+   const router = useRouter()
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
+   const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false)
+ 
+   // 模拟视频数据，实际项目中应从API获取
+   const videoData = {
+     id: parseInt(params.id),
+     title: "医疗团队协作",
+     description: "本视频详细讲解医疗团队协作的重要性和具体方法，适合所有医护人员观看学习。团队协作在现代医疗体系中扮演着至关重要的角色，能有效提高医疗质量和患者安全。",
+     categoryId: 3,
+     categoryName: "急救技能",
+     instructorId: 3,
+     instructorName: "李主任",
+     duration: 1800, // 秒
+     videoUrl: "/placeholder.mp4",
+     thumbnailUrl: "/placeholder.jpg",
+     accessType: "internal", // internal or external
+     views: 432,
+     status: "published", // draft, published, archived
+     uploadDate: "2025-03-01",
+     createdAt: "2025-03-01T10:00:00Z",
+     updatedAt: "2025-03-05T15:30:00Z",
+     tags: ["团队协作", "沟通技巧", "医护管理"],
+     materials: [
+       { id: 1, name: "团队协作指南.pdf", fileType: "pdf", fileSize: 1024, downloadCount: 45 },
+       { id: 2, name: "案例分析.docx", fileType: "docx", fileSize: 512, downloadCount: 32 }
+     ],
+     comments: [
+       { id: 1, userName: "张医生", content: "内容非常实用，对日常工作很有帮助。", createdAt: "2025-03-10T14:25:00Z" },
+       { id: 2, userName: "李护士", content: "讲解清晰易懂，案例丰富。", createdAt: "2025-03-12T09:17:00Z" }
+     ]
+   }
+ 
+   // 格式化视频时长
+   const formatDuration = (seconds: number) =&gt; {
+     const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600)
+     const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
+     const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60
+     
+     if (hours &gt; 0) {
+       return &#96;${hours}小时${minutes}分钟${remainingSeconds}秒&#96;
+     } else {
+       return &#96;${minutes}分钟${remainingSeconds}秒&#96;
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   // 格式化文件大小
+   const formatFileSize = (sizeInKB: number) =&gt; {
+     if (sizeInKB &lt; 1024) {
+       return &#96;${sizeInKB} KB&#96;
+     } else {
+       return &#96;${(sizeInKB / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB&#96;
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   // 格式化日期
+   const formatDate = (dateString: string) =&gt; {
+     const date = new Date(dateString)
+     return date.toLocaleDateString('zh-CN', {
+       year: 'numeric',
+       month: 'long',
+       day: 'numeric',
+       hour: '2-digit',
+       minute: '2-digit'
+     })
+   }
+ 
+   // 处理删除视频
+   const handleDeleteVideo = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       setIsLoading(true)
+       // 实际项目中应调用API删除视频
+       // await videoApi.deleteVideo(videoData.id)
+       
+       console.log("删除视频", videoData.id)
+       
+       toast({
+         title: "视频已删除",
+         description: "视频及相关资源已成功删除",
+       })
+       
+       // 关闭对话框并跳转回视频列表页
+       setIsDialogOpen(false)
+       router.push("/admin/videos")
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("删除视频失败", error)
+       toast({
+         variant: "destructive",
+         title: "删除失败",
+         description: "删除视频时出现错误，请重试",
+       })
+     } finally {
+       setIsLoading(false)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between"&gt;
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+             &lt;Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="gap-1" asChild&gt;
+               &lt;Link href="/admin/videos"&gt;
+                 &lt;ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                 返回视频列表
+               &lt;/Link&gt;
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-2"&gt;
+             &lt;h2 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight"&gt;{videoData.title}&lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;Badge variant={videoData.accessType === "internal" ? "secondary" : "outline"}&gt;
+               {videoData.accessType === "internal" ? "会员专享" : "公开课程"}
+             &lt;/Badge&gt;
+             &lt;Badge variant={
+               videoData.status === "published" ? "default" : 
+               videoData.status === "draft" ? "outline" : "secondary"
+             }&gt;
+               {
+                 videoData.status === "published" ? "已发布" : 
+                 videoData.status === "draft" ? "草稿" : "已归档"
+               }
+             &lt;/Badge&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+           &lt;Button variant="outline" asChild&gt;
+             &lt;Link href={&#96;/admin/videos/${params.id}/edit&#96;}&gt;
+               &lt;Edit className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+               编辑视频
+             &lt;/Link&gt;
+           &lt;/Button&gt;
+           &lt;Dialog open={isDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDialogOpen}&gt;
+             &lt;DialogTrigger asChild&gt;
+               &lt;Button variant="destructive"&gt;
+                 &lt;Trash2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                 删除视频
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;/DialogTrigger&gt;
+             &lt;DialogContent&gt;
+               &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+                 &lt;DialogTitle&gt;确认删除视频&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+                 &lt;DialogDescription&gt;
+                   您确定要删除视频 "{videoData.title}" 吗？此操作无法撤销，视频相关的所有数据都将被永久删除。
+                 &lt;/DialogDescription&gt;
+               &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+               &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+                 &lt;Button variant="outline" onClick={() =&gt; setIsDialogOpen(false)}&gt;取消&lt;/Button&gt;
+                 &lt;Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleDeleteVideo} disabled={isLoading}&gt;
+                   {isLoading ? "删除中..." : "确认删除"}
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+             &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+           &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6"&gt;
+           &lt;Card&gt;
+             &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+               &lt;CardTitle&gt;视频预览&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+               &lt;CardDescription&gt;查看视频内容和基本信息&lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+             &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+             &lt;CardContent&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative aspect-video overflow-hidden rounded-md border bg-muted mb-6"&gt;
+                 {videoData.thumbnailUrl ? (
+                   &lt;div className="relative w-full h-full"&gt;
+                     &lt;img 
+                       src={videoData.thumbnailUrl} 
+                       alt={videoData.title} 
+                       className="object-cover w-full h-full"
+                     /&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+                       &lt;Button size="icon" variant="outline" className="rounded-full bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-sm h-12 w-12"&gt;
+                         &lt;Play className="h-6 w-6" /&gt;
+                       &lt;/Button&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ) : (
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full"&gt;
+                     &lt;Play className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground" /&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 )}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               
+               &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;描述&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.description}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 
+                 &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-4"&gt;
+                   &lt;div&gt;
+                     &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1"&gt;
+                       &lt;Tag className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                       分类
+                     &lt;/Label&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.categoryName}&lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div&gt;
+                     &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1"&gt;
+                       &lt;Users className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                       讲师
+                     &lt;/Label&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.instructorName}&lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div&gt;
+                     &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1"&gt;
+                       &lt;Calendar className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                       上传日期
+                     &lt;/Label&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.uploadDate}&lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div&gt;
+                     &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1"&gt;
+                       &lt;Clock className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                       时长
+                     &lt;/Label&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{formatDuration(videoData.duration)}&lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;标签&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1"&gt;
+                     {videoData.tags.map((tag, index) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;Badge key={index} variant="outline"&gt;{tag}&lt;/Badge&gt;
+                     ))}
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+           &lt;/Card&gt;
+           
+           &lt;Tabs defaultValue="materials"&gt;
+             &lt;TabsList&gt;
+               &lt;TabsTrigger value="materials"&gt;相关资料&lt;/TabsTrigger&gt;
+               &lt;TabsTrigger value="comments"&gt;评论&lt;/TabsTrigger&gt;
+               &lt;TabsTrigger value="statistics"&gt;统计数据&lt;/TabsTrigger&gt;
+             &lt;/TabsList&gt;
+             &lt;TabsContent value="materials"&gt;
+               &lt;Card&gt;
+                 &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+                   &lt;CardTitle&gt;相关学习资料&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+                   &lt;CardDescription&gt;视频附带的学习资料和文档&lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+                 &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+                 &lt;CardContent&gt;
+                   {videoData.materials.length &gt; 0 ? (
+                     &lt;Table&gt;
+                       &lt;TableHeader&gt;
+                         &lt;TableRow&gt;
+                           &lt;TableHead&gt;文件名&lt;/TableHead&gt;
+                           &lt;TableHead&gt;类型&lt;/TableHead&gt;
+                           &lt;TableHead&gt;大小&lt;/TableHead&gt;
+                           &lt;TableHead&gt;下载次数&lt;/TableHead&gt;
+                           &lt;TableHead&gt;操作&lt;/TableHead&gt;
+                         &lt;/TableRow&gt;
+                       &lt;/TableHeader&gt;
+                       &lt;TableBody&gt;
+                         {videoData.materials.map((material) =&gt; (
+                           &lt;TableRow key={material.id}&gt;
+                             &lt;TableCell className="font-medium"&gt;
+                               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                                 &lt;FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" /&gt;
+                                 {material.name}
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                             &lt;TableCell&gt;{material.fileType.toUpperCase()}&lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                             &lt;TableCell&gt;{formatFileSize(material.fileSize)}&lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                             &lt;TableCell&gt;{material.downloadCount}&lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                             &lt;TableCell&gt;
+                               &lt;Button variant="ghost" size="sm"&gt;
+                                 &lt;Download className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /&gt;
+                                 下载
+                               &lt;/Button&gt;
+                             &lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                           &lt;/TableRow&gt;
+                         ))}
+                       &lt;/TableBody&gt;
+                     &lt;/Table&gt;
+                   ) : (
+                     &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                       &lt;FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mb-2" /&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground mb-2"&gt;该视频没有附带资料&lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;Button size="sm" variant="outline"&gt;
+                         上传资料
+                       &lt;/Button&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+               &lt;/Card&gt;
+             &lt;/TabsContent&gt;
+             &lt;TabsContent value="comments"&gt;
+               &lt;Card&gt;
+                 &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+                   &lt;CardTitle&gt;用户评论&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+                   &lt;CardDescription&gt;用户对该视频的评论和反馈&lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+                 &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+                 &lt;CardContent&gt;
+                   {videoData.comments.length &gt; 0 ? (
+                     &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                       {videoData.comments.map((comment) =&gt; (
+                         &lt;div key={comment.id} className="border rounded-md p-4"&gt;
+                           &lt;div className="flex justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+                             &lt;span className="font-medium"&gt;{comment.userName}&lt;/span&gt;
+                             &lt;span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;{formatDate(comment.createdAt)}&lt;/span&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                           &lt;p&gt;{comment.content}&lt;/p&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       ))}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   ) : (
+                     &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;该视频暂无评论&lt;/p&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+               &lt;/Card&gt;
+             &lt;/TabsContent&gt;
+             &lt;TabsContent value="statistics"&gt;
+               &lt;Card&gt;
+                 &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+                   &lt;CardTitle&gt;观看统计&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+                   &lt;CardDescription&gt;视频的观看数据和用户行为统计&lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+                 &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+                 &lt;CardContent&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="border rounded-md p-4"&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-muted-foreground text-sm mb-1"&gt;总观看次数&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold"&gt;{videoData.views}&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="border rounded-md p-4"&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-muted-foreground text-sm mb-1"&gt;平均观看时长&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold"&gt;15分32秒&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="border rounded-md p-4"&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-muted-foreground text-sm mb-1"&gt;完成率&lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold"&gt;76%&lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="mt-6"&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center"&gt;
+                       完整统计数据可在系统分析面板中查看
+                     &lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+               &lt;/Card&gt;
+             &lt;/TabsContent&gt;
+           &lt;/Tabs&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         
+         &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+           &lt;Card&gt;
+             &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+               &lt;CardTitle&gt;视频信息&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+               &lt;CardDescription&gt;视频的技术和系统信息&lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+             &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+             &lt;CardContent&gt;
+               &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;视频ID&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.id}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;URL 路径&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1 break-all text-sm"&gt;{videoData.videoUrl}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;创建时间&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{formatDate(videoData.createdAt)}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;最后更新&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{formatDate(videoData.updatedAt)}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label className="text-muted-foreground"&gt;视频观看次数&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="mt-1"&gt;{videoData.views} 次&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+             &lt;CardFooter className="flex justify-between border-t px-6 py-4"&gt;
+               &lt;Button variant="outline" asChild&gt;
+                 &lt;Link href={&#96;/video/${videoData.id}&#96;}&gt;
+                   &lt;Eye className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                   前台查看
+                 &lt;/Link&gt;
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;Button variant="outline" asChild&gt;
+                 &lt;Link href={&#96;/admin/videos/${videoData.id}/edit&#96;}&gt;
+                   &lt;Edit className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                   编辑信息
+                 &lt;/Link&gt;
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;/CardFooter&gt;
+           &lt;/Card&gt;
+           
+           &lt;Card&gt;
+             &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+               &lt;CardTitle&gt;相关操作&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+             &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+             &lt;CardContent className="space-y-2"&gt;
+               &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                 添加到推荐视频
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                 添加相关资料
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                 更新缩略图
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               {videoData.status === "published" ? (
+                 &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                   归档视频
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               ) : videoData.status === "archived" ? (
+                 &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                   恢复视频
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 &lt;Button className="w-full justify-start" variant="outline"&gt;
+                   发布视频
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+           &lt;/Card&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   )
+ } 
```

</details>

```diff
  export default function VideosPage() {
+   // 管理删除对话框
+   const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false)
+   const [videoToDelete, setVideoToDelete] = useState&lt;number | null&gt;(null)
+   const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false)

+   // 处理删除视频
+   const handleDeleteVideo = async () =&gt; {
+     if (!videoToDelete) return
+

+       // 关闭对话框并重置状态
+       setDeleteDialogOpen(false)
+       setVideoToDelete(null)
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("删除视频失败", error)
+       toast({
+         variant: "destructive",
+         title: "删除失败",
+         description: "删除视频时出现错误，请重试",
+       })
+     } finally {
+       setIsDeleting(false)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   // 处理删除按钮点击
+   const handleDeleteClick = (videoId: number) =&gt; {
+     setVideoToDelete(videoId)
+     setDeleteDialogOpen(true)
+   }
+   
+   // 处理搜索
+   const handleSearch = (e: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;) =&gt; {
+     setSearchQuery(e.target.value)
+   }
+
```

```diff
-                   &lt;PaginationLink href="#"&gt;3&lt;/PaginationLink&gt;
-                 &lt;/PaginationItem&gt;
-                 &lt;PaginationItem&gt;
-                   &lt;PaginationNext href="#" /&gt;
-                 &lt;/PaginationItem&gt;
-               &lt;/PaginationContent&gt;
-             &lt;/Pagination&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/CardContent&gt;
        &lt;/Card&gt;
+ 
+       {/* 删除确认对话框 */}
+       &lt;Dialog open={deleteDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setDeleteDialogOpen}&gt;
+         &lt;DialogContent&gt;
+           &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+             &lt;DialogTitle&gt;确认删除视频&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+             &lt;DialogDescription&gt;
+               您确定要删除该视频吗？此操作无法撤销，视频相关的所有数据都将被永久删除。
+             &lt;/DialogDescription&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+             &lt;Button variant="outline" onClick={() =&gt; setDeleteDialogOpen(false)}&gt;取消&lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;Button 
+               variant="destructive" 
+               onClick={handleDeleteVideo} 
+               disabled={isDeleting}
+             &gt;
+               {isDeleting ? "删除中..." : "确认删除"}
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+       &lt;/Dialog&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    )
```
